```typescriptreact
        <ModalOverlay data-modal="prompt" />
        <ModalContent data-modal="prompt" maxW="1200px">
          <ModalHeader>
            <HStack justify="space-between" w="full">
              <Text>Prompt Content</Text>
              <HStack spacing={2}>
                <IconButton
                  aria-label="Copy prompt"
                  icon={<FiCopy />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  onClick={handleCopyPrompt}
                />
                <IconButton
                  aria-label="Close modal"
                  icon={<FiX />}
                  size="sm"
                  variant="ghost"
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    onModalClose()
                  }}
                />
              </HStack>
            </HStack>
          </ModalHeader>
          <ModalBody pb={6}>
            <Box
              border="1px solid"
              borderColor="gray.200"
              borderRadius="md"
              p={4}
              bg="gray.50"
              fontSize="sm"
              color="gray.800"
              maxH="70vh"
              overflowY="auto"
              whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
              wordBreak="break-word"
            >
              {promptText || 'No prompt information'}
            </Box>
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default AIGridDiskSidebar


```

```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react'
import {
  Box,
  VStack,
  HStack,
  Text,
  Badge,
  Spinner,
  Alert,
  AlertIcon,
  IconButton,
  useToast,
  Card,
  CardBody,
  CardHeader,
  Heading,
  Button,
  Modal,
  ModalOverlay,
  ModalContent,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalBody,
  ModalFooter,
  useDisclosure,
  Textarea,
} from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { FiX, FiRefreshCw, FiDatabase, FiInfo, FiChevronDown, FiChevronUp, FiCopy, FiEdit2 } from 'react-icons/fi'
import { AppNodeService } from '@/services/appNodeService'
import type { AppNode } from '@/types/appNode'

interface AIGridDiskSidebarProps {
  diskId: number
  diskName: string
  isOpen: boolean
  onClose: () => void
}

export const AIGridDiskSidebar: React.FC<AIGridDiskSidebarProps> = ({
  diskId,
  diskName,
  isOpen,
  onClose
}) => {
  const [diskData, setDiskData] = useState<AppNode | null>(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [isPromptExpanded, setIsPromptExpanded] = useState(false)
  const { isOpen: isModalOpen, onOpen: onModalOpen, onClose: onModalClose } = useDisclosure()
  const toast = useToast()
  
  // Edit prompt state
  const [isEditingPrompt, setIsEditingPrompt] = useState(false)
  const [editedPrompt, setEditedPrompt] = useState('')
  const [originalPrompt, setOriginalPrompt] = useState('')
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
  
  // Check if prompt can be edited
  const canEditPrompt = useMemo(() => {
    return diskData?.status === 'draft' && diskData?.category === 'report'
  }, [diskData?.status, diskData?.category])

  // Determine if prompt should use modal (long content) or inline expansion (short content)
  const promptText = diskData?.prompt || ''
  const shouldUseModal = promptText.length >= 500
  const MAX_PREVIEW_LINES = 5

  // Get preview text (first N lines)
  const getPreviewText = (text: string, maxLines: number): string => {
    if (!text) return ''
    const lines = text.split('\n')
    if (lines.length <= maxLines) return text
    return lines.slice(0, maxLines).join('\n') + '...'
  }

  const promptPreview = useMemo(() => {
    if (!promptText) return ''
    if (isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal) return promptText
    return getPreviewText(promptText, MAX_PREVIEW_LINES)
  }, [promptText, isPromptExpanded, shouldUseModal])

  const hasMoreContent = useMemo(() => {
    if (!promptText) return false
    // Show "View More" if content is long (use modal) or has more lines than preview
    if (shouldUseModal) return true
    const lines = promptText.split('\n')
    return lines.length > MAX_PREVIEW_LINES
  }, [promptText, shouldUseModal])

  // Handle "View More" button click
  const handleViewMore = () => {
    if (shouldUseModal) {
      // Reset edit state when opening modal
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setEditedPrompt('')
      setOriginalPrompt(promptText)
      onModalOpen()
    } else {
      setIsPromptExpanded(true)
    }
  }
  
  // Handle edit prompt
  const handleEditPrompt = () => {
    setOriginalPrompt(promptText)
    setEditedPrompt(promptText)
    setIsEditingPrompt(true)
  }
  
  // Handle cancel edit
  const handleCancelEdit = () => {
    setEditedPrompt('')
    setIsEditingPrompt(false)
    // Restore original prompt
    if (diskData) {
      setDiskData({
        ...diskData,
        prompt: originalPrompt
      })
    }
  }
  
  // Handle save prompt
  const handleSavePrompt = async () => {
    if (!diskData || !canEditPrompt) return
    
    setIsSaving(true)
    try {
      // Update disk prompt using AppNodeService
      await AppNodeService.updateDisk(diskData.id, {
        prompt: editedPrompt
      })
      
      // Refresh disk data
      await fetchDiskData()
      
      // Exit edit mode
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setOriginalPrompt('')
      
      toast({
        title: "Saved successfully",
        description: "Prompt has been updated",
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('Failed to save prompt:', err)
      toast({
        title: "Save failed",
        description: err.message || "Failed to update prompt",
        status: "error",
        duration: 5000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } finally {
      setIsSaving(false)
    }
  }

  // Handle copy to clipboard
  const handleCopyPrompt = async (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
    // Prevent event bubbling to avoid closing modal
    if (e) {
      e.stopPropagation()
      e.preventDefault()
    }
    
    if (!promptText) return
    try {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(promptText)
      toast({
        title: "Copied",
        description: "Prompt content copied to clipboard",
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } catch (err) {
      toast({
        title: "Copy failed",
        description: "Failed to copy to clipboard",
        status: "error",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen && diskId) {
      fetchDiskData()
      // Reset expansion state when opening sidebar
      setIsPromptExpanded(false)
      // Reset edit state
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setEditedPrompt('')
      setOriginalPrompt('')
    }
  }, [isOpen, diskId])
  
  // Update edited prompt when diskData changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (diskData && isEditingPrompt) {
      setEditedPrompt(diskData.prompt || '')
    }
  }, [diskData, isEditingPrompt])

  const fetchDiskData = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    setError(null)
    
    try {
      console.log('🔍 Fetching disk data for disk ID:', diskId)
      
      // Create a timeout promise
      const timeoutPromise = new Promise((_, reject) => {
        setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('Request timeout, please try again later')), 15000) // 15 second timeout
      })
      
      // Fetch disk data from app_node table
      const diskPromise = AppNodeService.getAppNode(diskId)
      const appNodeData = await Promise.race([diskPromise, timeoutPromise]) as AppNode
      
      console.log('📋 AppNode data received:', appNodeData)
      setDiskData(appNodeData)
      
      toast({
        title: "Data loaded successfully",
        description: `Disk information loaded`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('❌ Failed to fetch disk data:', err)
      const errorMessage = err.message || 'Failed to load disk data'
      setError(errorMessage)
      
      toast({
        title: "Load failed",
        description: errorMessage,
        status: "error",
        duration: 5000,
      })
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    if (!dateString) return 'Unknown'
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleString('en-US', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
      hour: '2-digit',
      minute: '2-digit'
    })
  }

  if (!isOpen) return null

  return (
    <Box
      position="fixed"
      right={0}
      top={0}
      w="400px"
      h="100vh"
      bg="white"
      shadow="xl"
      borderLeft="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      zIndex={1000}
      overflow="hidden"
      data-sidebar="disk-properties"
    >
      <VStack spacing={0} h="full">
        {/* Header */}
        <Box w="full" p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.200" bg="gray.50">
          <HStack justify="space-between">
            <HStack spacing={3}>
              <FiDatabase size={20} color="#3182ce" />
              <VStack spacing={0} align="start">
                <Text fontSize="lg" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.800">
                  Disk Properties
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
                  {diskName}
                </Text>
              </VStack>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <IconButton
                aria-label="Refresh data"
                icon={<FiRefreshCw />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={fetchDiskData}
                isLoading={loading}
              />
              <IconButton
                aria-label="Close panel"
                icon={<FiX />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={onClose}
              />
            </HStack>
          </HStack>
        </Box>

        {/* Content */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="auto" p={4}>
          <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">
            {loading && (
              <HStack justify="center" py={8}>
                <Spinner size="md" color="blue.500" />
                <Text color="gray.600">Loading disk data...</Text>
              </HStack>
            )}

            {error && (
              <Alert status="error" size="sm" borderRadius="md">
                <AlertIcon />
                <Text fontSize="sm">{error}</Text>
              </Alert>
            )}

            {/* Disk Basic Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    <FiInfo style={{ display: 'inline', marginRight: '8px' }} />
                    Basic Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Disk ID:</Text>
                      <Badge variant="outline" colorScheme="blue">
                        {diskData.id}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Disk Name:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" fontWeight="medium" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.name}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Category:</Text>
                      <Badge colorScheme="green" variant="subtle">
                        {diskData.category || 'Not set'}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Status:</Text>
                      <Badge 
                        colorScheme={diskData.status === 'published' ? 'green' : 'orange'} 
                        variant="subtle"
                      >
                        {diskData.status}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk Functional Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    ⚙️ Functional Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <Box>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600" mb={2}>Requirement:</Text>
                      <Box
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        borderRadius="md"
                        p={3}
                        bg="gray.50"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        color="gray.800"
                      >
                        {diskData.requirement || 'No requirement defined'}
                      </Box>
                    </Box>
                    
                    <Box>
                      <HStack justify="space-between" mb={2}>
                        <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Prompt:</Text>
                        {promptText && (
                          <IconButton
                            aria-label="Copy prompt"
                            icon={<FiCopy />}
                            size="xs"
                            variant="ghost"
                            onClick={(e) => {
                              e.stopPropagation()
                              handleCopyPrompt(e)
                            }}
                          />
                        )}
                      </HStack>
                      <Box
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        borderRadius="md"
                        p={3}
                        bg="gray.50"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        color="gray.800"
                        maxH={isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal ? "300px" : "100px"}
                        overflowY="auto"
                        whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                        wordBreak="break-word"
                      >
                        {promptPreview || 'No prompt information'}
                      </Box>
                      {hasMoreContent && !isPromptExpanded && (
                        <Button
                          size="xs"
                          variant="ghost"
                          leftIcon={<FiChevronDown />}
                          onClick={handleViewMore}
                          mt={2}
                          w="full"
                        >
                          View More
                        </Button>
                      )}
                      {isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal && (
                        <Button
                          size="xs"
                          variant="ghost"
                          leftIcon={<FiChevronUp />}
                          onClick={() => setIsPromptExpanded(false)}
                          mt={2}
                          w="full"
                        >
                          Show Less
                        </Button>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk File Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    📁 File Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <Box>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600" mb={2}>File Locations:</Text>
                      {diskData.file_locations ? (
                        (() => {
                          try {
                            const fileLocations = typeof diskData.file_locations === 'string' 
                              ? JSON.parse(diskData.file_locations) 
                              : diskData.file_locations
                            if (Array.isArray(fileLocations) && fileLocations.length > 0) {
                              return (
                                <VStack spacing={2} align="stretch">
                                  {fileLocations.map((location: string, index: number) => (
                                    <Box
                                      key={index}
                                      border="1px solid"
                                      borderColor="gray.200"
                                      borderRadius="md"
                                      p={2}
                                      bg="gray.50"
                                      fontSize="sm"
                                      color="gray.800"
                                    >
                                      {location}
                                    </Box>
                                  ))}
                                </VStack>
                              )
                            }
                          } catch (e) {
                            console.error('Failed to parse file_locations:', e)
                          }
                          return <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">No file location information</Text>
                        })()
                      ) : (
                        <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">No file location information</Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk Time Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    ⏰ Time Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Create Time:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.create_time ? formatDate(diskData.create_time) : 'Unknown'}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Update Time:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.update_time ? formatDate(diskData.update_time) : 'Unknown'}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk Relationship Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    🔗 Relationship Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">App ID:</Text>
                      <Badge variant="outline" colorScheme="blue">
                        {diskData.app_id || 'Unknown'}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Created By:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.owner?.full_name || diskData.owner?.email || diskData.created_by || 'Unknown'}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}
          </VStack>
        </Box>
      </VStack>

      {/* Prompt Modal for long content */}
      <Modal isOpen={isModalOpen} onClose={onModalClose} closeOnOverlayClick={false}>
        <ModalOverlay data-modal="prompt" />
        <ModalContent data-modal="prompt" maxW="1200px">
          <ModalHeader>
            <HStack justify="space-between" w="full">
              <Text>Prompt Content</Text>
              <HStack spacing={2}>
                {!isEditingPrompt && canEditPrompt && (
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Edit prompt"
                    icon={<FiEdit2 />}
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={handleEditPrompt}
                  />
                )}
                {!isEditingPrompt && (
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Copy prompt"
                    icon={<FiCopy />}
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={handleCopyPrompt}
                  />
                )}
                {!isEditingPrompt && (
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Close modal"
                    icon={<FiX />}
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onModalClose()
                      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
                      setEditedPrompt('')
                    }}
                  />
                )}
              </HStack>
            </HStack>
          </ModalHeader>
          <ModalBody pb={6}>
            {isEditingPrompt ? (
              <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">
                <Textarea
                  value={editedPrompt}
                  onChange={(e) => setEditedPrompt(e.target.value)}
                  placeholder="Enter prompt content..."
                  minH="400px"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontFamily="mono"
                  resize="vertical"
                />
                <HStack justify="flex-end">
                  <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.500">
                    {editedPrompt.length} characters
                  </Text>
                </HStack>
              </VStack>
            ) : (
              <Box
                border="1px solid"
                borderColor="gray.200"
                borderRadius="md"
                p={4}
                bg="gray.50"
                fontSize="sm"
                color="gray.800"
                maxH="70vh"
                overflowY="auto"
                whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                wordBreak="break-word"
              >
                {promptText || 'No prompt information'}
              </Box>
            )}
          </ModalBody>
          {isEditingPrompt && (
            <ModalFooter>
              <HStack spacing={3}>
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  onClick={handleCancelEdit}
                  isDisabled={isSaving}
                >
                  Cancel
                </Button>
                <Button
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  onClick={handleSavePrompt}
                  isLoading={isSaving}
                  loadingText="Saving..."
                >
                  Save
                </Button>
              </HStack>
            </ModalFooter>
          )}
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default AIGridDiskSidebar


```

检查代码并修复可能的问题：


修复 Cancel 逻辑：取消时仅退出编辑模式，不修改 diskData。


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react'
import {
  Box,
  VStack,
  HStack,
  Text,
  Badge,
  Spinner,
  Alert,
  AlertIcon,
  IconButton,
  useToast,
  Card,
  CardBody,
  CardHeader,
  Heading,
  Button,
  Modal,
  ModalOverlay,
  ModalContent,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalBody,
  ModalFooter,
  useDisclosure,
  Textarea,
} from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { FiX, FiRefreshCw, FiDatabase, FiInfo, FiChevronDown, FiChevronUp, FiCopy, FiEdit2 } from 'react-icons/fi'
import { AppNodeService } from '@/services/appNodeService'
import type { AppNode } from '@/types/appNode'

interface AIGridDiskSidebarProps {
  diskId: number
  diskName: string
  isOpen: boolean
  onClose: () => void
}

export const AIGridDiskSidebar: React.FC<AIGridDiskSidebarProps> = ({
  diskId,
  diskName,
  isOpen,
  onClose
}) => {
  const [diskData, setDiskData] = useState<AppNode | null>(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [isPromptExpanded, setIsPromptExpanded] = useState(false)
  const { isOpen: isModalOpen, onOpen: onModalOpen, onClose: onModalClose } = useDisclosure()
  const toast = useToast()
  
  // Edit prompt state
  const [isEditingPrompt, setIsEditingPrompt] = useState(false)
  const [editedPrompt, setEditedPrompt] = useState('')
  const [originalPrompt, setOriginalPrompt] = useState('')
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
  
  // Check if prompt can be edited
  const canEditPrompt = useMemo(() => {
    return diskData?.status === 'draft' && diskData?.category === 'report'
  }, [diskData?.status, diskData?.category])

  // Determine if prompt should use modal (long content) or inline expansion (short content)
  const promptText = diskData?.prompt || ''
  const shouldUseModal = promptText.length >= 500
  const MAX_PREVIEW_LINES = 5

  // Get preview text (first N lines)
  const getPreviewText = (text: string, maxLines: number): string => {
    if (!text) return ''
    const lines = text.split('\n')
    if (lines.length <= maxLines) return text
    return lines.slice(0, maxLines).join('\n') + '...'
  }

  const promptPreview = useMemo(() => {
    if (!promptText) return ''
    if (isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal) return promptText
    return getPreviewText(promptText, MAX_PREVIEW_LINES)
  }, [promptText, isPromptExpanded, shouldUseModal])

  const hasMoreContent = useMemo(() => {
    if (!promptText) return false
    // Show "View More" if content is long (use modal) or has more lines than preview
    if (shouldUseModal) return true
    const lines = promptText.split('\n')
    return lines.length > MAX_PREVIEW_LINES
  }, [promptText, shouldUseModal])

  // Handle "View More" button click
  const handleViewMore = () => {
    if (shouldUseModal) {
      // Reset edit state when opening modal
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setEditedPrompt('')
      setOriginalPrompt(promptText)
      onModalOpen()
    } else {
      setIsPromptExpanded(true)
    }
  }
  
  // Handle edit prompt
  const handleEditPrompt = () => {
    setOriginalPrompt(promptText)
    setEditedPrompt(promptText)
    setIsEditingPrompt(true)
  }
  
  // Handle cancel edit
  const handleCancelEdit = () => {
    // Simply exit edit mode, discard changes
    setEditedPrompt('')
    setIsEditingPrompt(false)
    // No need to modify diskData, as it still contains the original prompt
  }
  
  // Handle save prompt
  const handleSavePrompt = async () => {
    if (!diskData || !canEditPrompt) return
    
    setIsSaving(true)
    try {
      // Update disk prompt using AppNodeService
      await AppNodeService.updateDisk(diskData.id, {
        prompt: editedPrompt
      })
      
      // Refresh disk data
      await fetchDiskData()
      
      // Exit edit mode
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setOriginalPrompt('')
      
      toast({
        title: "Saved successfully",
        description: "Prompt has been updated",
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('Failed to save prompt:', err)
      toast({
        title: "Save failed",
        description: err.message || "Failed to update prompt",
        status: "error",
        duration: 5000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } finally {
      setIsSaving(false)
    }
  }

  // Handle copy to clipboard
  const handleCopyPrompt = async (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
    // Prevent event bubbling to avoid closing modal
    if (e) {
      e.stopPropagation()
      e.preventDefault()
    }
    
    if (!promptText) return
    try {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(promptText)
      toast({
        title: "Copied",
        description: "Prompt content copied to clipboard",
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } catch (err) {
      toast({
        title: "Copy failed",
        description: "Failed to copy to clipboard",
        status: "error",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen && diskId) {
      fetchDiskData()
      // Reset expansion state when opening sidebar
      setIsPromptExpanded(false)
      // Reset edit state
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setEditedPrompt('')
      setOriginalPrompt('')
    }
  }, [isOpen, diskId])
  
  // Update edited prompt when diskData changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (diskData && isEditingPrompt) {
      setEditedPrompt(diskData.prompt || '')
    }
  }, [diskData, isEditingPrompt])

  const fetchDiskData = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    setError(null)
    
    try {
      console.log('🔍 Fetching disk data for disk ID:', diskId)
      
      // Create a timeout promise
      const timeoutPromise = new Promise((_, reject) => {
        setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('Request timeout, please try again later')), 15000) // 15 second timeout
      })
      
      // Fetch disk data from app_node table
      const diskPromise = AppNodeService.getAppNode(diskId)
      const appNodeData = await Promise.race([diskPromise, timeoutPromise]) as AppNode
      
      console.log('📋 AppNode data received:', appNodeData)
      setDiskData(appNodeData)
      
      toast({
        title: "Data loaded successfully",
        description: `Disk information loaded`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('❌ Failed to fetch disk data:', err)
      const errorMessage = err.message || 'Failed to load disk data'
      setError(errorMessage)
      
      toast({
        title: "Load failed",
        description: errorMessage,
        status: "error",
        duration: 5000,
      })
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    if (!dateString) return 'Unknown'
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleString('en-US', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
      hour: '2-digit',
      minute: '2-digit'
    })
  }

  if (!isOpen) return null

  return (
    <Box
      position="fixed"
      right={0}
      top={0}
      w="400px"
      h="100vh"
      bg="white"
      shadow="xl"
      borderLeft="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      zIndex={1000}
      overflow="hidden"
      data-sidebar="disk-properties"
    >
      <VStack spacing={0} h="full">
        {/* Header */}
        <Box w="full" p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.200" bg="gray.50">
          <HStack justify="space-between">
            <HStack spacing={3}>
              <FiDatabase size={20} color="#3182ce" />
              <VStack spacing={0} align="start">
                <Text fontSize="lg" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.800">
                  Disk Properties
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
                  {diskName}
                </Text>
              </VStack>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <IconButton
                aria-label="Refresh data"
                icon={<FiRefreshCw />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={fetchDiskData}
                isLoading={loading}
              />
              <IconButton
                aria-label="Close panel"
                icon={<FiX />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={onClose}
              />
            </HStack>
          </HStack>
        </Box>

        {/* Content */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="auto" p={4}>
          <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">
            {loading && (
              <HStack justify="center" py={8}>
                <Spinner size="md" color="blue.500" />
                <Text color="gray.600">Loading disk data...</Text>
              </HStack>
            )}

            {error && (
              <Alert status="error" size="sm" borderRadius="md">
                <AlertIcon />
                <Text fontSize="sm">{error}</Text>
              </Alert>
            )}

            {/* Disk Basic Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    <FiInfo style={{ display: 'inline', marginRight: '8px' }} />
                    Basic Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Disk ID:</Text>
                      <Badge variant="outline" colorScheme="blue">
                        {diskData.id}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Disk Name:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" fontWeight="medium" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.name}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Category:</Text>
                      <Badge colorScheme="green" variant="subtle">
                        {diskData.category || 'Not set'}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Status:</Text>
                      <Badge 
                        colorScheme={diskData.status === 'published' ? 'green' : 'orange'} 
                        variant="subtle"
                      >
                        {diskData.status}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk Functional Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    ⚙️ Functional Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <Box>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600" mb={2}>Requirement:</Text>
                      <Box
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        borderRadius="md"
                        p={3}
                        bg="gray.50"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        color="gray.800"
                      >
                        {diskData.requirement || 'No requirement defined'}
                      </Box>
                    </Box>
                    
                    <Box>
                      <HStack justify="space-between" mb={2}>
                        <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Prompt:</Text>
                        {promptText && (
                          <IconButton
                            aria-label="Copy prompt"
                            icon={<FiCopy />}
                            size="xs"
                            variant="ghost"
                            onClick={(e) => {
                              e.stopPropagation()
                              handleCopyPrompt(e)
                            }}
                          />
                        )}
                      </HStack>
                      <Box
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        borderRadius="md"
                        p={3}
                        bg="gray.50"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        color="gray.800"
                        maxH={isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal ? "300px" : "100px"}
                        overflowY="auto"
                        whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                        wordBreak="break-word"
                      >
                        {promptPreview || 'No prompt information'}
                      </Box>
                      {hasMoreContent && !isPromptExpanded && (
                        <Button
                          size="xs"
                          variant="ghost"
                          leftIcon={<FiChevronDown />}
                          onClick={handleViewMore}
                          mt={2}
                          w="full"
                        >
                          View More
                        </Button>
                      )}
                      {isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal && (
                        <Button
                          size="xs"
                          variant="ghost"
                          leftIcon={<FiChevronUp />}
                          onClick={() => setIsPromptExpanded(false)}
                          mt={2}
                          w="full"
                        >
                          Show Less
                        </Button>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk File Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    📁 File Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <Box>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600" mb={2}>File Locations:</Text>
                      {diskData.file_locations ? (
                        (() => {
                          try {
                            const fileLocations = typeof diskData.file_locations === 'string' 
                              ? JSON.parse(diskData.file_locations) 
                              : diskData.file_locations
                            if (Array.isArray(fileLocations) && fileLocations.length > 0) {
                              return (
                                <VStack spacing={2} align="stretch">
                                  {fileLocations.map((location: string, index: number) => (
                                    <Box
                                      key={index}
                                      border="1px solid"
                                      borderColor="gray.200"
                                      borderRadius="md"
                                      p={2}
                                      bg="gray.50"
                                      fontSize="sm"
                                      color="gray.800"
                                    >
                                      {location}
                                    </Box>
                                  ))}
                                </VStack>
                              )
                            }
                          } catch (e) {
                            console.error('Failed to parse file_locations:', e)
                          }
                          return <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">No file location information</Text>
                        })()
                      ) : (
                        <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">No file location information</Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk Time Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    ⏰ Time Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Create Time:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.create_time ? formatDate(diskData.create_time) : 'Unknown'}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Update Time:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.update_time ? formatDate(diskData.update_time) : 'Unknown'}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk Relationship Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    🔗 Relationship Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">App ID:</Text>
                      <Badge variant="outline" colorScheme="blue">
                        {diskData.app_id || 'Unknown'}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Created By:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.owner?.full_name || diskData.owner?.email || diskData.created_by || 'Unknown'}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}
          </VStack>
        </Box>
      </VStack>

      {/* Prompt Modal for long content */}
      <Modal isOpen={isModalOpen} onClose={onModalClose} closeOnOverlayClick={false}>
        <ModalOverlay data-modal="prompt" />
        <ModalContent data-modal="prompt" maxW="1200px">
          <ModalHeader>
            <HStack justify="space-between" w="full">
              <Text>Prompt Content</Text>
              <HStack spacing={2}>
                {!isEditingPrompt && canEditPrompt && (
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Edit prompt"
                    icon={<FiEdit2 />}
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={handleEditPrompt}
                  />
                )}
                {!isEditingPrompt && (
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Copy prompt"
                    icon={<FiCopy />}
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={handleCopyPrompt}
                  />
                )}
                {!isEditingPrompt && (
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Close modal"
                    icon={<FiX />}
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onModalClose()
                      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
                      setEditedPrompt('')
                    }}
                  />
                )}
              </HStack>
            </HStack>
          </ModalHeader>
          <ModalBody pb={6}>
            {isEditingPrompt ? (
              <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">
                <Textarea
                  value={editedPrompt}
                  onChange={(e) => setEditedPrompt(e.target.value)}
                  placeholder="Enter prompt content..."
                  minH="400px"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontFamily="mono"
                  resize="vertical"
                />
                <HStack justify="flex-end">
                  <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.500">
                    {editedPrompt.length} characters
                  </Text>
                </HStack>
              </VStack>
            ) : (
              <Box
                border="1px solid"
                borderColor="gray.200"
                borderRadius="md"
                p={4}
                bg="gray.50"
                fontSize="sm"
                color="gray.800"
                maxH="70vh"
                overflowY="auto"
                whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                wordBreak="break-word"
              >
                {promptText || 'No prompt information'}
              </Box>
            )}
          </ModalBody>
          {isEditingPrompt && (
            <ModalFooter>
              <HStack spacing={3}>
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  onClick={handleCancelEdit}
                  isDisabled={isSaving}
                >
                  Cancel
                </Button>
                <Button
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  onClick={handleSavePrompt}
                  isLoading={isSaving}
                  loadingText="Saving..."
                >
                  Save
                </Button>
              </HStack>
            </ModalFooter>
          )}
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default AIGridDiskSidebar


```

检查 useEffect 逻辑，确保编辑状态管理正确：


修复 useEffect 逻辑，避免在编辑模式下自动更新 editedPrompt：


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react'
import {
  Box,
  VStack,
  HStack,
  Text,
  Badge,
  Spinner,
  Alert,
  AlertIcon,
  IconButton,
  useToast,
  Card,
  CardBody,
  CardHeader,
  Heading,
  Button,
  Modal,
  ModalOverlay,
  ModalContent,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalBody,
  ModalFooter,
  useDisclosure,
  Textarea,
} from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { FiX, FiRefreshCw, FiDatabase, FiInfo, FiChevronDown, FiChevronUp, FiCopy, FiEdit2 } from 'react-icons/fi'
import { AppNodeService } from '@/services/appNodeService'
import type { AppNode } from '@/types/appNode'

interface AIGridDiskSidebarProps {
  diskId: number
  diskName: string
  isOpen: boolean
  onClose: () => void
}

export const AIGridDiskSidebar: React.FC<AIGridDiskSidebarProps> = ({
  diskId,
  diskName,
  isOpen,
  onClose
}) => {
  const [diskData, setDiskData] = useState<AppNode | null>(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [isPromptExpanded, setIsPromptExpanded] = useState(false)
  const { isOpen: isModalOpen, onOpen: onModalOpen, onClose: onModalClose } = useDisclosure()
  const toast = useToast()
  
  // Edit prompt state
  const [isEditingPrompt, setIsEditingPrompt] = useState(false)
  const [editedPrompt, setEditedPrompt] = useState('')
  const [originalPrompt, setOriginalPrompt] = useState('')
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
  
  // Check if prompt can be edited
  const canEditPrompt = useMemo(() => {
    return diskData?.status === 'draft' && diskData?.category === 'report'
  }, [diskData?.status, diskData?.category])

  // Determine if prompt should use modal (long content) or inline expansion (short content)
  const promptText = diskData?.prompt || ''
  const shouldUseModal = promptText.length >= 500
  const MAX_PREVIEW_LINES = 5

  // Get preview text (first N lines)
  const getPreviewText = (text: string, maxLines: number): string => {
    if (!text) return ''
    const lines = text.split('\n')
    if (lines.length <= maxLines) return text
    return lines.slice(0, maxLines).join('\n') + '...'
  }

  const promptPreview = useMemo(() => {
    if (!promptText) return ''
    if (isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal) return promptText
    return getPreviewText(promptText, MAX_PREVIEW_LINES)
  }, [promptText, isPromptExpanded, shouldUseModal])

  const hasMoreContent = useMemo(() => {
    if (!promptText) return false
    // Show "View More" if content is long (use modal) or has more lines than preview
    if (shouldUseModal) return true
    const lines = promptText.split('\n')
    return lines.length > MAX_PREVIEW_LINES
  }, [promptText, shouldUseModal])

  // Handle "View More" button click
  const handleViewMore = () => {
    if (shouldUseModal) {
      // Reset edit state when opening modal
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setEditedPrompt('')
      setOriginalPrompt(promptText)
      onModalOpen()
    } else {
      setIsPromptExpanded(true)
    }
  }
  
  // Handle edit prompt
  const handleEditPrompt = () => {
    setOriginalPrompt(promptText)
    setEditedPrompt(promptText)
    setIsEditingPrompt(true)
  }
  
  // Handle cancel edit
  const handleCancelEdit = () => {
    // Simply exit edit mode, discard changes
    setEditedPrompt('')
    setIsEditingPrompt(false)
    // No need to modify diskData, as it still contains the original prompt
  }
  
  // Handle save prompt
  const handleSavePrompt = async () => {
    if (!diskData || !canEditPrompt) return
    
    setIsSaving(true)
    try {
      // Update disk prompt using AppNodeService
      await AppNodeService.updateDisk(diskData.id, {
        prompt: editedPrompt
      })
      
      // Refresh disk data
      await fetchDiskData()
      
      // Exit edit mode
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setOriginalPrompt('')
      
      toast({
        title: "Saved successfully",
        description: "Prompt has been updated",
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('Failed to save prompt:', err)
      toast({
        title: "Save failed",
        description: err.message || "Failed to update prompt",
        status: "error",
        duration: 5000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } finally {
      setIsSaving(false)
    }
  }

  // Handle copy to clipboard
  const handleCopyPrompt = async (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
    // Prevent event bubbling to avoid closing modal
    if (e) {
      e.stopPropagation()
      e.preventDefault()
    }
    
    if (!promptText) return
    try {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(promptText)
      toast({
        title: "Copied",
        description: "Prompt content copied to clipboard",
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } catch (err) {
      toast({
        title: "Copy failed",
        description: "Failed to copy to clipboard",
        status: "error",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen && diskId) {
      fetchDiskData()
      // Reset expansion state when opening sidebar
      setIsPromptExpanded(false)
      // Reset edit state
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setEditedPrompt('')
      setOriginalPrompt('')
    }
  }, [isOpen, diskId])

  const fetchDiskData = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    setError(null)
    
    try {
      console.log('🔍 Fetching disk data for disk ID:', diskId)
      
      // Create a timeout promise
      const timeoutPromise = new Promise((_, reject) => {
        setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('Request timeout, please try again later')), 15000) // 15 second timeout
      })
      
      // Fetch disk data from app_node table
      const diskPromise = AppNodeService.getAppNode(diskId)
      const appNodeData = await Promise.race([diskPromise, timeoutPromise]) as AppNode
      
      console.log('📋 AppNode data received:', appNodeData)
      setDiskData(appNodeData)
      
      toast({
        title: "Data loaded successfully",
        description: `Disk information loaded`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('❌ Failed to fetch disk data:', err)
      const errorMessage = err.message || 'Failed to load disk data'
      setError(errorMessage)
      
      toast({
        title: "Load failed",
        description: errorMessage,
        status: "error",
        duration: 5000,
      })
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    if (!dateString) return 'Unknown'
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleString('en-US', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
      hour: '2-digit',
      minute: '2-digit'
    })
  }

  if (!isOpen) return null

  return (
    <Box
      position="fixed"
      right={0}
      top={0}
      w="400px"
      h="100vh"
      bg="white"
      shadow="xl"
      borderLeft="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      zIndex={1000}
      overflow="hidden"
      data-sidebar="disk-properties"
    >
      <VStack spacing={0} h="full">
        {/* Header */}
        <Box w="full" p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.200" bg="gray.50">
          <HStack justify="space-between">
            <HStack spacing={3}>
              <FiDatabase size={20} color="#3182ce" />
              <VStack spacing={0} align="start">
                <Text fontSize="lg" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.800">
                  Disk Properties
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
                  {diskName}
                </Text>
              </VStack>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <IconButton
                aria-label="Refresh data"
                icon={<FiRefreshCw />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={fetchDiskData}
                isLoading={loading}
              />
              <IconButton
                aria-label="Close panel"
                icon={<FiX />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={onClose}
              />
            </HStack>
          </HStack>
        </Box>

        {/* Content */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="auto" p={4}>
          <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">
            {loading && (
              <HStack justify="center" py={8}>
                <Spinner size="md" color="blue.500" />
                <Text color="gray.600">Loading disk data...</Text>
              </HStack>
            )}

            {error && (
              <Alert status="error" size="sm" borderRadius="md">
                <AlertIcon />
                <Text fontSize="sm">{error}</Text>
              </Alert>
            )}

            {/* Disk Basic Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    <FiInfo style={{ display: 'inline', marginRight: '8px' }} />
                    Basic Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Disk ID:</Text>
                      <Badge variant="outline" colorScheme="blue">
                        {diskData.id}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Disk Name:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" fontWeight="medium" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.name}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Category:</Text>
                      <Badge colorScheme="green" variant="subtle">
                        {diskData.category || 'Not set'}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Status:</Text>
                      <Badge 
                        colorScheme={diskData.status === 'published' ? 'green' : 'orange'} 
                        variant="subtle"
                      >
                        {diskData.status}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk Functional Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    ⚙️ Functional Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <Box>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600" mb={2}>Requirement:</Text>
                      <Box
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        borderRadius="md"
                        p={3}
                        bg="gray.50"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        color="gray.800"
                      >
                        {diskData.requirement || 'No requirement defined'}
                      </Box>
                    </Box>
                    
                    <Box>
                      <HStack justify="space-between" mb={2}>
                        <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Prompt:</Text>
                        {promptText && (
                          <IconButton
                            aria-label="Copy prompt"
                            icon={<FiCopy />}
                            size="xs"
                            variant="ghost"
                            onClick={(e) => {
                              e.stopPropagation()
                              handleCopyPrompt(e)
                            }}
                          />
                        )}
                      </HStack>
                      <Box
                        border="1px solid"
                        borderColor="gray.200"
                        borderRadius="md"
                        p={3}
                        bg="gray.50"
                        fontSize="sm"
                        color="gray.800"
                        maxH={isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal ? "300px" : "100px"}
                        overflowY="auto"
                        whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                        wordBreak="break-word"
                      >
                        {promptPreview || 'No prompt information'}
                      </Box>
                      {hasMoreContent && !isPromptExpanded && (
                        <Button
                          size="xs"
                          variant="ghost"
                          leftIcon={<FiChevronDown />}
                          onClick={handleViewMore}
                          mt={2}
                          w="full"
                        >
                          View More
                        </Button>
                      )}
                      {isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal && (
                        <Button
                          size="xs"
                          variant="ghost"
                          leftIcon={<FiChevronUp />}
                          onClick={() => setIsPromptExpanded(false)}
                          mt={2}
                          w="full"
                        >
                          Show Less
                        </Button>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk File Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    📁 File Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <Box>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600" mb={2}>File Locations:</Text>
                      {diskData.file_locations ? (
                        (() => {
                          try {
                            const fileLocations = typeof diskData.file_locations === 'string' 
                              ? JSON.parse(diskData.file_locations) 
                              : diskData.file_locations
                            if (Array.isArray(fileLocations) && fileLocations.length > 0) {
                              return (
                                <VStack spacing={2} align="stretch">
                                  {fileLocations.map((location: string, index: number) => (
                                    <Box
                                      key={index}
                                      border="1px solid"
                                      borderColor="gray.200"
                                      borderRadius="md"
                                      p={2}
                                      bg="gray.50"
                                      fontSize="sm"
                                      color="gray.800"
                                    >
                                      {location}
                                    </Box>
                                  ))}
                                </VStack>
                              )
                            }
                          } catch (e) {
                            console.error('Failed to parse file_locations:', e)
                          }
                          return <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">No file location information</Text>
                        })()
                      ) : (
                        <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">No file location information</Text>
                      )}
                    </Box>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk Time Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    ⏰ Time Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Create Time:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.create_time ? formatDate(diskData.create_time) : 'Unknown'}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Update Time:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.update_time ? formatDate(diskData.update_time) : 'Unknown'}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}

            {/* Disk Relationship Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    🔗 Relationship Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">App ID:</Text>
                      <Badge variant="outline" colorScheme="blue">
                        {diskData.app_id || 'Unknown'}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Created By:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.owner?.full_name || diskData.owner?.email || diskData.created_by || 'Unknown'}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                  </VStack>
                </CardBody>
              </Card>
            )}
          </VStack>
        </Box>
      </VStack>

      {/* Prompt Modal for long content */}
      <Modal isOpen={isModalOpen} onClose={onModalClose} closeOnOverlayClick={false}>
        <ModalOverlay data-modal="prompt" />
        <ModalContent data-modal="prompt" maxW="1200px">
          <ModalHeader>
            <HStack justify="space-between" w="full">
              <Text>Prompt Content</Text>
              <HStack spacing={2}>
                {!isEditingPrompt && canEditPrompt && (
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Edit prompt"
                    icon={<FiEdit2 />}
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={handleEditPrompt}
                  />
                )}
                {!isEditingPrompt && (
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Copy prompt"
                    icon={<FiCopy />}
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={handleCopyPrompt}
                  />
                )}
                {!isEditingPrompt && (
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Close modal"
                    icon={<FiX />}
                    size="sm"
                    variant="ghost"
                    onClick={(e) => {
                      e.stopPropagation()
                      onModalClose()
                      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
                      setEditedPrompt('')
                    }}
                  />
                )}
              </HStack>
            </HStack>
          </ModalHeader>
          <ModalBody pb={6}>
            {isEditingPrompt ? (
              <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">
                <Textarea
                  value={editedPrompt}
                  onChange={(e) => setEditedPrompt(e.target.value)}
                  placeholder="Enter prompt content..."
                  minH="400px"
                  fontSize="sm"
                  fontFamily="mono"
                  resize="vertical"
                />
                <HStack justify="flex-end">
                  <Text fontSize="xs" color="gray.500">
                    {editedPrompt.length} characters
                  </Text>
                </HStack>
              </VStack>
            ) : (
              <Box
                border="1px solid"
                borderColor="gray.200"
                borderRadius="md"
                p={4}
                bg="gray.50"
                fontSize="sm"
                color="gray.800"
                maxH="70vh"
                overflowY="auto"
                whiteSpace="pre-wrap"
                wordBreak="break-word"
              >
                {promptText || 'No prompt information'}
              </Box>
            )}
          </ModalBody>
          {isEditingPrompt && (
            <ModalFooter>
              <HStack spacing={3}>
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  onClick={handleCancelEdit}
                  isDisabled={isSaving}
                >
                  Cancel
                </Button>
                <Button
                  colorScheme="blue"
                  onClick={handleSavePrompt}
                  isLoading={isSaving}
                  loadingText="Saving..."
                >
                  Save
                </Button>
              </HStack>
            </ModalFooter>
          )}
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default AIGridDiskSidebar


```

检查 Modal 关闭逻辑，确保关闭时重置编辑状态：


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react'
import {
  Box,
  VStack,
  HStack,
  Text,
  Badge,
  Spinner,
  Alert,
  AlertIcon,
  IconButton,
  useToast,
  Card,
  CardBody,
  CardHeader,
  Heading,
  Button,
  Modal,
  ModalOverlay,
  ModalContent,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalBody,
  ModalFooter,
  useDisclosure,
  Textarea,
} from '@chakra-ui/react'
import { FiX, FiRefreshCw, FiDatabase, FiInfo, FiChevronDown, FiChevronUp, FiCopy, FiEdit2 } from 'react-icons/fi'
import { AppNodeService } from '@/services/appNodeService'
import type { AppNode } from '@/types/appNode'

interface AIGridDiskSidebarProps {
  diskId: number
  diskName: string
  isOpen: boolean
  onClose: () => void
}

export const AIGridDiskSidebar: React.FC<AIGridDiskSidebarProps> = ({
  diskId,
  diskName,
  isOpen,
  onClose
}) => {
  const [diskData, setDiskData] = useState<AppNode | null>(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [isPromptExpanded, setIsPromptExpanded] = useState(false)
  const { isOpen: isModalOpen, onOpen: onModalOpen, onClose: onModalClose } = useDisclosure()
  const toast = useToast()
  
  // Edit prompt state
  const [isEditingPrompt, setIsEditingPrompt] = useState(false)
  const [editedPrompt, setEditedPrompt] = useState('')
  const [originalPrompt, setOriginalPrompt] = useState('')
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
  
  // Check if prompt can be edited
  const canEditPrompt = useMemo(() => {
    return diskData?.status === 'draft' && diskData?.category === 'report'
  }, [diskData?.status, diskData?.category])

  // Determine if prompt should use modal (long content) or inline expansion (short content)
  const promptText = diskData?.prompt || ''
  const shouldUseModal = promptText.length >= 500
  const MAX_PREVIEW_LINES = 5

  // Get preview text (first N lines)
  const getPreviewText = (text: string, maxLines: number): string => {
    if (!text) return ''
    const lines = text.split('\n')
    if (lines.length <= maxLines) return text
    return lines.slice(0, maxLines).join('\n') + '...'
  }

  const promptPreview = useMemo(() => {
    if (!promptText) return ''
    if (isPromptExpanded && !shouldUseModal) return promptText
    return getPreviewText(promptText, MAX_PREVIEW_LINES)
  }, [promptText, isPromptExpanded, shouldUseModal])

  const hasMoreContent = useMemo(() => {
    if (!promptText) return false
    // Show "View More" if content is long (use modal) or has more lines than preview
    if (shouldUseModal) return true
    const lines = promptText.split('\n')
    return lines.length > MAX_PREVIEW_LINES
  }, [promptText, shouldUseModal])

  // Handle "View More" button click
  const handleViewMore = () => {
    if (shouldUseModal) {
      // Reset edit state when opening modal
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setEditedPrompt('')
      setOriginalPrompt(promptText)
      onModalOpen()
    } else {
      setIsPromptExpanded(true)
    }
  }
  
  // Handle edit prompt
  const handleEditPrompt = () => {
    setOriginalPrompt(promptText)
    setEditedPrompt(promptText)
    setIsEditingPrompt(true)
  }
  
  // Handle cancel edit
  const handleCancelEdit = () => {
    // Simply exit edit mode, discard changes
    setEditedPrompt('')
    setIsEditingPrompt(false)
    // No need to modify diskData, as it still contains the original prompt
  }
  
  // Handle save prompt
  const handleSavePrompt = async () => {
    if (!diskData || !canEditPrompt) return
    
    setIsSaving(true)
    try {
      // Update disk prompt using AppNodeService
      await AppNodeService.updateDisk(diskData.id, {
        prompt: editedPrompt
      })
      
      // Refresh disk data
      await fetchDiskData()
      
      // Exit edit mode
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setOriginalPrompt('')
      
      toast({
        title: "Saved successfully",
        description: "Prompt has been updated",
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('Failed to save prompt:', err)
      toast({
        title: "Save failed",
        description: err.message || "Failed to update prompt",
        status: "error",
        duration: 5000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } finally {
      setIsSaving(false)
    }
  }

  // Handle copy to clipboard
  const handleCopyPrompt = async (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
    // Prevent event bubbling to avoid closing modal
    if (e) {
      e.stopPropagation()
      e.preventDefault()
    }
    
    if (!promptText) return
    try {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(promptText)
      toast({
        title: "Copied",
        description: "Prompt content copied to clipboard",
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    } catch (err) {
      toast({
        title: "Copy failed",
        description: "Failed to copy to clipboard",
        status: "error",
        duration: 2000,
      })
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen && diskId) {
      fetchDiskData()
      // Reset expansion state when opening sidebar
      setIsPromptExpanded(false)
      // Reset edit state
      setIsEditingPrompt(false)
      setEditedPrompt('')
      setOriginalPrompt('')
    }
  }, [isOpen, diskId])

  const fetchDiskData = async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    setError(null)
    
    try {
      console.log('🔍 Fetching disk data for disk ID:', diskId)
      
      // Create a timeout promise
      const timeoutPromise = new Promise((_, reject) => {
        setTimeout(() => reject(new Error('Request timeout, please try again later')), 15000) // 15 second timeout
      })
      
      // Fetch disk data from app_node table
      const diskPromise = AppNodeService.getAppNode(diskId)
      const appNodeData = await Promise.race([diskPromise, timeoutPromise]) as AppNode
      
      console.log('📋 AppNode data received:', appNodeData)
      setDiskData(appNodeData)
      
      toast({
        title: "Data loaded successfully",
        description: `Disk information loaded`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      
    } catch (err: any) {
      console.error('❌ Failed to fetch disk data:', err)
      const errorMessage = err.message || 'Failed to load disk data'
      setError(errorMessage)
      
      toast({
        title: "Load failed",
        description: errorMessage,
        status: "error",
        duration: 5000,
      })
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    if (!dateString) return 'Unknown'
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleString('en-US', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric',
      hour: '2-digit',
      minute: '2-digit'
    })
  }

  if (!isOpen) return null

  return (
    <Box
      position="fixed"
      right={0}
      top={0}
      w="400px"
      h="100vh"
      bg="white"
      shadow="xl"
      borderLeft="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      zIndex={1000}
      overflow="hidden"
      data-sidebar="disk-properties"
    >
      <VStack spacing={0} h="full">
        {/* Header */}
        <Box w="full" p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.200" bg="gray.50">
          <HStack justify="space-between">
            <HStack spacing={3}>
              <FiDatabase size={20} color="#3182ce" />
              <VStack spacing={0} align="start">
                <Text fontSize="lg" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.800">
                  Disk Properties
                </Text>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">
                  {diskName}
                </Text>
              </VStack>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <IconButton
                aria-label="Refresh data"
                icon={<FiRefreshCw />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={fetchDiskData}
                isLoading={loading}
              />
              <IconButton
                aria-label="Close panel"
                icon={<FiX />}
                size="sm"
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={onClose}
              />
            </HStack>
          </HStack>
        </Box>

        {/* Content */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="auto" p={4}>
          <VStack spacing={4} align="stretch">
            {loading && (
              <HStack justify="center" py={8}>
                <Spinner size="md" color="blue.500" />
                <Text color="gray.600">Loading disk data...</Text>
              </HStack>
            )}

            {error && (
              <Alert status="error" size="sm" borderRadius="md">
                <AlertIcon />
                <Text fontSize="sm">{error}</Text>
              </Alert>
            )}

            {/* Disk Basic Info */}
            {diskData && (
              <Card size="sm">
                <CardHeader pb={2}>
                  <Heading size="sm" color="gray.700">
                    <FiInfo style={{ display: 'inline', marginRight: '8px' }} />
                    Basic Information
                  </Heading>
                </CardHeader>
                <CardBody pt={0}>
                  <VStack spacing={3} align="stretch">
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Disk ID:</Text>
                      <Badge variant="outline" colorScheme="blue">
                        {diskData.id}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Disk Name:</Text>
                      <Text fontSize="sm" fontWeight="medium" color="gray.800">
                        {diskData.name}
                      </Text>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Category:</Text>
                      <Badge colorScheme="green" variant="subtle">
                        {diskData.category || 'Not set'}
                      </Badge>
                    </HStack>
                    
                    <HStack justify="space-between">
                      <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.600">Status:</Text>
```
