```typescriptreact
  const handleGridEdit = useCallback((gridId: string) => {
    setEditingGridId(gridId)
    setEditingLockId(gridId)
    setSelectedGridId(gridId)
  }, [])

  // Get disk info for sidebar
  const editingDiskInfo = useMemo(() => {
    if (!editingGridId) return null
    const gridItem = gridItems.get(editingGridId)
    if (!gridItem || gridItem.disks.length === 0) return null
    const disk = gridItem.disks[0] // Each grid item contains only one disk
    return {
      diskId: disk.id,
      diskName: disk.name,
    }
  }, [editingGridId, gridItems])
  const isDiskSidebarOpen = !!editingDiskInfo

  const previousOverflowRef = useRef<{ body: string; html: string }>({ body: '', html: '' })

  useEffect(() => {
    const body = document.body
    const html = document.documentElement

    if (isDiskSidebarOpen) {
      previousOverflowRef.current = {
        body: body.style.overflowY,
        html: html.style.overflowY,
      }
      body.style.overflowY = 'hidden'
      html.style.overflowY = 'hidden'
    } else {
      body.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.body || ''
      html.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.html || ''
    }

    return () => {
      body.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.body || ''
      html.style.overflowY = previousOverflowRef.current.html || ''
    }
  }, [isDiskSidebarOpen])

  // Handle grid delete
  const handleGridDelete = useCallback((gridId: string) => {
    setGridItems((prev) => {
      const next = new Map(prev)
      next.delete(gridId)
      return next
    })
    setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
      const newLayouts: Layouts = {}
      Object.keys(prevLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
        const layout = prevLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
        newLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = layout.filter((item) => item.i !== gridId)
      })
      return newLayouts
    })
    setSelectedGridId(null)
    if (!editingLockId || editingLockId === gridId) {
      setEditingGridId(null)
      setEditingLockId(null)
    }
    toast({
      title: "Deleted",
      description: "Grid item deleted",
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
    })
  }, [toast])

  const handleTextEditChange = useCallback(
    ({ gridItemId, diskId, markdown }: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number; markdown: string }) => {
      pendingTextEditsRef.current.set(gridItemId, { diskId, markdown })
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        const item = next.get(gridItemId)
        if (!item) {
          return prev
        }
        const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
          if (disk.id !== diskId) {
            return disk
          }
          if (!disk.latestResult) {
            return disk
          }
          return {
            ...disk,
            latestResult: {
              ...disk.latestResult,
              conclusion_detail: markdown,
              updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
            },
          }
        })
        next.set(gridItemId, { ...item, disks: updatedDisks })
        return next
      })
      setHasUnsavedChanges(true)
      if (currentGridSpaceId) {
        onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, true)
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, onUnsavedChange]
  )

  type TextEditCommitPayload = {
    gridItemId: string
    diskId: number
    markdown: string
    persistToSpace?: boolean
  }

  const handleTextEditCommit = useCallback(
    async ({ gridItemId, diskId, markdown, persistToSpace = false }: TextEditCommitPayload) => {
      const shouldLog = import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_SAVE === "true"
      if (shouldLog) {
        console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - START", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId,
          persistToSpace,
          currentGridSpaceId,
          markdownLength: markdown.length,
          markdownPreview: markdown.substring(0, 200),
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        })
      }
      pendingTextEditsRef.current.delete(gridItemId)
      
      // First, check if item exists in current gridItems
      const currentItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
      if (!currentItem) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Item not found in gridItems", {
          gridItemId,
          availableItems: Array.from(gridItems.keys()),
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Grid item not found. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Check if disk exists
      const targetDisk = currentItem.disks.find((d) => d.id === diskId)
      if (!targetDisk) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Disk not found", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId,
          availableDisks: currentItem.disks.map((d) => d.id),
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Disk not found. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      if (!targetDisk.latestResult) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - latestResult not found", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId,
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Execution result not found. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Directly build updatedItems without relying on setGridItems callback
      console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Building updatedItems directly", {
        gridItemId,
        diskId,
        currentItemsCount: gridItems.size,
      })

      // Create a new Map with updated disk
      const updatedItems = new Map(gridItems)
      const item = updatedItems.get(gridItemId)
      
      if (!item) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Item not found when building updatedItems", {
          gridItemId,
          availableItems: Array.from(updatedItems.keys()),
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Grid item not found when updating. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Update the specific disk
      const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
        if (disk.id !== diskId) {
          return disk
        }

        if (!disk.latestResult) {
          console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - latestResult not found for disk in updatedItems", {
            gridItemId,
            diskId: disk.id,
          })
          return disk
        }

        const updatedDisk: typeof disk = {
          ...disk,
          latestResult: {
            ...disk.latestResult,
            conclusion_detail: markdown,
            updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          },
        }
        console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Updated disk conclusion_detail", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId: disk.id,
          oldConclusionDetailLength: disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail?.length ?? 0,
          newConclusionDetailLength: markdown.length,
          conclusionDetailPreview: markdown.substring(0, 200),
        })
        return updatedDisk
      })

      // Verify that the disk was actually updated
      const wasUpdated = updatedDisks.some((disk) => {
        if (disk.id !== diskId) return false
        return disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail === markdown
      })

      if (!wasUpdated) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Disk was not updated", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId,
          targetDiskId: targetDisk.id,
          targetDiskIdType: typeof targetDisk.id,
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Failed to update grid item. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 5000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Update the item with new disks
      const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
        ...item,
        disks: updatedDisks,
      }
      updatedItems.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)

      // Update React state (for UI update)
      setGridItems(updatedItems)

      if (persistToSpace && currentGridSpaceId) {
        try {
          const shouldLog = import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_SAVE === "true"
          if (shouldLog) {
            console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Calling saveGridSpaceData", {
              gridItemId,
              diskId,
              currentGridSpaceId,
              updatedItemsCount: updatedItems.size,
            })
          }
          await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
          if (shouldLog) {
            console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - saveGridSpaceData SUCCESS", {
              gridItemId,
              diskId,
              currentGridSpaceId,
            })
          }
          pendingTextEditsRef.current.delete(gridItemId)
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - saveGridSpaceData ERROR", {
            gridItemId,
            diskId,
            currentGridSpaceId,
            error,
          })
          setHasUnsavedChanges(true)
          if (currentGridSpaceId) {
            onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, true)
          }
          toast({
            title: "Save Failed",
            description: "Failed to save text changes. Please try again.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
        }
      } else {
        console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Skipping persist", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId,
          persistToSpace,
          currentGridSpaceId,
        })
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, gridItems, onUnsavedChange, saveGridSpaceData, toast]
  )

  // Handle grid cut
  const [runModalState, setRunModalState] = useState<{
    isOpen: boolean
    gridItemId: string | null
    disk: GridItemData["disks"][number] | null
  }>({
    isOpen: false,
    gridItemId: null,
    disk: null,
  })

  // Helper function to parse dashboard requirement
  const parseDashboardRequirement = useCallback((disk: any) => {
    try {
      if (disk.category === "dashboard" && disk.requirement) {
        try {
          const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
          if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
            // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
            const dashboardCharts = charts
              .filter((chart: any) => chart.echarts_option)
              .map((chart: any) => ({
                chart_type: chart.chart_type || "unknown",
                question_title: chart.question_title || "Untitled Chart",
                echarts_option: chart.echarts_option,
                echarts_template: chart.echarts_template,
                queries: chart.queries,
                data_source: chart.data_source,
                created_at: chart.created_at,
                pinned_at: chart.pinned_at,
                pinned_by: chart.pinned_by,
              }))
              // Sort by pinned_at (or created_at as fallback) in descending order (newest first)
              .sort((a: any, b: any) => {
                const timeA = a.pinned_at || a.created_at || ""
                const timeB = b.pinned_at || b.created_at || ""
                // Compare timestamps in descending order (newest first)
                return timeB.localeCompare(timeA)
              })

            if (dashboardCharts.length > 0) {
              return {
                dashboardCharts,
                dashboardError: undefined,
              }
            } else {
              return {
                dashboardCharts: undefined,
                dashboardError: "No valid chart configuration found in requirement",
              }
            }
          } else {
            return {
              dashboardCharts: undefined,
              dashboardError: "Requirement is not a valid array",
            }
          }
        } catch (parseError) {
          console.error(
            `Failed to parse dashboard requirement for disk ${disk.id}:`,
            parseError
          )
          return {
            dashboardCharts: undefined,
            dashboardError: `Failed to parse requirement: ${parseError instanceof Error ? parseError.message : "Unknown error"}`,
          }
        }
      } else {
        return {
          dashboardCharts: undefined,
          dashboardError: "Requirement field is empty",
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Failed to process dashboard disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
      return {
        dashboardCharts: undefined,
        dashboardError: `Failed to process dashboard: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
      }
    }
  }, [])

  const handleRefreshDisk = useCallback(
    async ({ gridItemId, diskId }: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number }) => {
      try {
        // Get current disk info to check its category
        const currentItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
        if (!currentItem) {
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Grid item not found.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        const currentDisk = currentItem.disks.find((d) => d.id === diskId)
        if (!currentDisk) {
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Disk not found.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Handle dashboard type disks - refresh by re-parsing requirement
        if (currentDisk.category === "dashboard") {
          // Fetch latest disk data from database (including updated requirement)
          const updatedDiskData = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(diskId)

          // Parse requirement to generate dashboardCharts
          const { dashboardCharts, dashboardError } = parseDashboardRequirement(updatedDiskData)

          // Update gridItems with refreshed dashboard data
          setGridItems((prev) => {
            const next = new Map(prev)
            const item = next.get(gridItemId)
            if (!item) {
              return prev
            }

            const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
              if (disk.id !== diskId) {
                return disk
              }
              return {
                ...disk,
                ...updatedDiskData, // Update with latest disk data
                dashboardCharts,
                dashboardError,
                latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
              }
            })

            const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
              ...item,
              disks: updatedDisks,
            }
            next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
            return next
          })

          toast({
            title: "Refreshed",
            description: "Dashboard charts have been refreshed with the latest configuration.",
            status: "success",
            duration: 2000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Handle regular disks - refresh latest execution result
        const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(diskId)
        
        if (!results || results.length === 0) {
          toast({
            title: "No results found",
            description: "This disk does not have any execution results yet.",
            status: "info",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Get the latest result (first one in the array, as they are sorted by created_at desc)
        const latestResult = results[0]

        // Update gridItems with the new latestResult
        setGridItems((prev) => {
          const next = new Map(prev)
          const item = next.get(gridItemId)
          if (!item) {
            return prev
          }

          const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
            if (disk.id !== diskId) {
              return disk
            }
            return {
              ...disk,
              latestResult,
              latestResultId: latestResult.id,
            }
          })

          const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
            ...item,
            disks: updatedDisks,
          }
          next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
          return next
        })

        toast({
          title: "Refreshed",
          description: "Disk result has been refreshed with the latest data.",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      } catch (error: any) {
        console.error("Failed to refresh disk:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Refresh Failed",
          description: error.message || "Failed to refresh disk. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      }
    },
    [toast, gridItems, parseDashboardRequirement]
  )

  const handleRun = useCallback(
    (gridItemId: string) => {
      const gridItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
      if (!gridItem || gridItem.disks.length === 0) {
        toast({
          title: "No disk available",
          description: "This grid item does not have a disk to run.",
          status: "warning",
          duration: 2000,
        })
        return
      }
      const disk = gridItem.disks[0]
      setRunModalState({
        isOpen: true,
        gridItemId,
        disk,
      })
    },
    [gridItems, toast]
  )

  const handleRunModalClose = useCallback(() => {
    setRunModalState((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      isOpen: false,
    }))
  }, [])

  const handleRunCompleted = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!runModalState.gridItemId || !runModalState.disk) {
      return
    }
    try {
      const currentDisk = runModalState.disk

      // Handle dashboard type disks - refresh by re-parsing requirement
      if (currentDisk.category === "dashboard") {
        // Fetch latest disk data from database (including updated requirement)
        const updatedDiskData = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(currentDisk.id)

        // Parse requirement to generate dashboardCharts
        const { dashboardCharts, dashboardError } = parseDashboardRequirement(updatedDiskData)

        // Update gridItems with refreshed dashboard data
        let updatedItems: Map<string, GridItemData> | null = null
        setGridItems((prev) => {
          const next = new Map(prev)
          const item = next.get(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "")
          if (!item) {
            return prev
          }

          const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
            if (disk.id !== currentDisk.id) {
              return disk
            }
            return {
              ...disk,
              ...updatedDiskData, // Update with latest disk data
              dashboardCharts,
              dashboardError,
              latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
            }
          })

          const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
            ...item,
            disks: updatedDisks,
          }
          next.set(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "", updatedItem)
          updatedItems = next
          return next
        })

        if (updatedItems) {
          await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
        }

        toast({
          title: "图表已刷新",
          description: "Dashboard 图表已更新",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Handle regular disks - refresh latest execution result
      const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(currentDisk.id)
      const latestResult = results[0] ?? null
      if (!latestResult) {
        return
      }

      let updatedItems: Map<string, GridItemData> | null = null
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        const item = next.get(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "")
        if (!item) {
          return prev
        }
        const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
          if (disk.id !== currentDisk.id) {
            return disk
          }
          return {
            ...disk,
            latestResultId: latestResult.id,
            latestResult,
          }
        })
        const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
          ...item,
          disks: updatedDisks,
        }
        next.set(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "", updatedItem)
        updatedItems = next
        return next
      })

      if (updatedItems) {
        await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to refresh after run:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Refresh Failed",
        description: "Failed to refresh disk results after running.",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [runModalState.disk, runModalState.gridItemId, saveGridSpaceData, toast, parseDashboardRequirement])

  // Only log in debug mode
  if (import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_RENDER === "true") {
    console.log("🎨 AIGridLayout RETURN - About to render JSX, isEditMode:", isEditMode)
  }

  return (
    <>
      {/* Disk Properties Sidebar */}
      {editingDiskInfo && (
        <>
          <Box
            position="fixed"
            top={0}
            left={0}
            right="400px"
            bottom={0}
            bg="rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"
            zIndex={900}
            onClick={() => {
              setEditingGridId(null)
              setEditingLockId(null)
            }}
          />
          <AIGridDiskSidebar
            diskId={editingDiskInfo.diskId}
            diskName={editingDiskInfo.diskName}
            isOpen={true}
            onClose={() => {
              setEditingGridId(null)
              setEditingLockId(null)
            }}
          />
        </>
      )}
      
      <Box
        ref={combinedRef}
        w="100%"
        minH="100%"
        maxW="100%"
        position="relative"
        border={isOver ? "2px dashed" : "none"}
        borderColor={isOver ? "blue.500" : "transparent"}
        overflow="visible"
        bg="#ffffff"
        sx={{
          // Grid background pattern using pseudo-elements to avoid Chakra UI conflicts
          // This ensures both horizontal and vertical lines are displayed
          position: 'relative',
          // Prevent flex layout from adjusting container size
          flexShrink: 0,
          flexGrow: 0,
          width: '100%',
          maxWidth: '100%',
          minWidth: 0,
          '&::before': {
            content: '""',
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            pointerEvents: 'none',
            zIndex: 0,
            // Horizontal lines (to bottom)
            backgroundImage: 'repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0, transparent calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb 15px)',
            backgroundSize: '100% 15px',
          },
          '&::after': {
            content: '""',
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            pointerEvents: 'none',
            zIndex: 0,
            // Vertical lines (to right)
            backgroundImage: 'repeating-linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0, transparent calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb 15px)',
            backgroundSize: '15px 100%',
          },
        }}
      >

      
      <Box
        ref={(node) => {
          gridLayoutContainerRef.current = node
          // Log when ref is set
          if (node) {
            const nodeRect = node.getBoundingClientRect()
            const parent = node.parentElement
            const parentRect = parent ? parent.getBoundingClientRect() : null
            
            console.log("🔗 [AIGridLayout] gridLayoutContainerRef - SET:", {
              offsetWidth: node.offsetWidth,
              clientWidth: node.clientWidth,
              scrollWidth: node.scrollWidth,
              offsetLeft: node.offsetLeft,
              scrollLeft: node.scrollLeft,
              boundingRect: {
                left: nodeRect.left,
                top: nodeRect.top,
                right: nodeRect.right,
                bottom: nodeRect.bottom,
                width: nodeRect.width,
                height: nodeRect.height,
              },
              parent: parent ? {
                offsetWidth: parent.offsetWidth,
                clientWidth: parent.clientWidth,
                scrollWidth: parent.scrollWidth,
                offsetLeft: parent.offsetLeft,
                scrollLeft: parent.scrollLeft,
                boundingRect: parentRect ? {
                  left: parentRect.left,
                  top: parentRect.top,
                  right: parentRect.right,
                  bottom: parentRect.bottom,
                  width: parentRect.width,
                  height: parentRect.height,
                } : null,
              } : null,
            })
          }
        }}
        w="100%"
        h="100%"
        maxW="100%"
        position="relative"
        zIndex={1}
        sx={{
          // Ensure the container doesn't expand beyond parent
          boxSizing: 'border-box',
          // Prevent horizontal scrolling from causing layout shift
          overflowX: 'hidden',
          overflowY: isEditMode ? 'hidden' : 'auto',
          // Force width to be exactly 100% of parent, no more
          width: '100%',
          maxWidth: '100%',
          minWidth: 0,
          // Allow container to expand beyond viewport height when content is larger
          minHeight: '100%',
        }}
      >
      <ResponsiveGridLayout
        className="layout"
        layouts={processedLayouts}
        breakpoints={{ lg: 1200, md: 996, sm: 768, xs: 480, xxs: 0 }}
        cols={GRID_CONFIG.cols}
        rowHeight={GRID_CONFIG.rowHeight}
        margin={GRID_CONFIG.margin}
        containerPadding={GRID_CONFIG.containerPadding}
        onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
        isDraggable={true}
        isResizable={true}
        resizeHandles={["se", "sw", "ne", "nw", "s", "n", "e", "w"]}
        compactType={null}
        draggableHandle=".grid-drag-handle"
      >
        {currentLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
          if (!itemData) return null

          // Only log in debug mode
          if (import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_RENDER === "true") {
            console.log("📦 Rendering AIGridItem:", {
              itemId: layoutItem.i,
              hasOnTogglePin: !!handleTogglePin,
              isPinned: itemData.isPinned,
              static: layoutItem.static
            })
          }

          return (
            <Box 
              key={layoutItem.i} 
              data-grid={layoutItem} 
              data-key={layoutItem.i}
              data-grid-item={layoutItem.i}
              ref={(node) => {
                if (node) {
                  gridItemRefs.current.set(layoutItem.i, node)
                } else {
                  gridItemRefs.current.delete(layoutItem.i)
                }
              }}
            >
              <AIGridItem 
                data={itemData} 
                onTogglePin={handleTogglePin}
                isEditMode={isEditMode}
                isSelected={selectedGridId === layoutItem.i}
                onSelect={() => handleGridSelect(layoutItem.i)}
                onEdit={() => handleGridEdit(layoutItem.i)}
                onDelete={() => handleGridDelete(layoutItem.i)}
                onRun={() => handleRun(layoutItem.i)}
                onTextEditChange={handleTextEditChange}
                onTextEditCommit={handleTextEditCommit}
                onRefreshDisk={handleRefreshDisk}
              />
            </Box>
          )
        })}
      </ResponsiveGridLayout>
      {runModalState.disk && (
        <AIGridRunModal
          isOpen={runModalState.isOpen}
          disk={runModalState.disk}
          onClose={handleRunModalClose}
          onCompleted={handleRunCompleted}
        />
      )}
      </Box>
    </Box>
    </>
  )
}

```

添加自动高度调整的 useEffect，使用 ResizeObserver 监听每个 grid item 的内容高度：


```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from "react"
import { Responsive, WidthProvider } from "react-grid-layout"
import type { Layout, Layouts } from "react-grid-layout"
import { Box, useToast } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { useDrop } from "react-dnd"
import { AIGridItem } from "./AIGridItem"
import { AIGridDiskSidebar } from "./AIGridDiskSidebar"
import { AIGridRunModal } from "./AIGridRunModal"
import { GridItemData, LayoutItem } from "./types"
import AppNodeService from "@/services/appNodeService"
import { DiskService } from "@/services/diskService"
import { GridSpaceService } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"
import "react-grid-layout/css/styles.css"
import "react-resizable/css/styles.css"

const ResponsiveGridLayout = WidthProvider(Responsive)

const EMPTY_LAYOUTS: Layouts = {
  lg: [],
  md: [],
  sm: [],
  xs: [],
  xxs: [],
}

const normalizeLayouts = (layouts?: Layouts | null): Layouts => {
  const normalized: Layouts = {
    lg: [],
    md: [],
    sm: [],
    xs: [],
    xxs: [],
  }
  if (!layouts) {
    return normalized
  }

  (Object.keys(normalized) as (keyof Layouts)[]).forEach((breakpoint) => {
    const breakpointLayout = layouts[breakpoint]
    if (Array.isArray(breakpointLayout)) {
      normalized[breakpoint] = breakpointLayout
    }
  })

  return normalized
}

const ensureLayoutsCoverAllItems = (layouts: Layouts, itemsMap: Map<string, GridItemData>) => {
  const breakpoints = Object.keys(GRID_CONFIG.cols) as (keyof Layouts)[]
  breakpoints.forEach((breakpoint) => {
    if (!Array.isArray(layouts[breakpoint])) {
      layouts[breakpoint] = []
    }
    const layout = layouts[breakpoint] as LayoutItem[]
    const existingIds = new Set(layout.map((item) => item.i))
    const cols = GRID_CONFIG.cols[breakpoint as keyof typeof GRID_CONFIG.cols]

    itemsMap.forEach((item) => {
      if (existingIds.has(item.i)) {
        return
      }
      const itemWidth = Math.min(item.w ?? DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w, cols)
      const clampedX = Math.max(0, Math.min(item.x ?? 0, cols - itemWidth))
      layout.push({
        i: item.i,
        x: clampedX,
        y: item.y ?? 0,
        w: itemWidth,
        h: item.h ?? DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
        minW: item.minW ?? DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minW,
        minH: item.minH ?? DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.minH,
        maxW: item.maxW ?? DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxW,
        maxH: item.maxH ?? DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.maxH,
      })
    })

    layout.sort((a, b) => {
      if (a.y === b.y) {
        return a.x - b.x
      }
      return a.y - b.y
    })
  })
}

interface AIGridLayoutProps {
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onLayoutChange?: (layouts: Layouts) => void
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onGridSpaceCreated?: (gridSpaceId: string) => void // 当 Grid Space 创建后调用
  onUnsavedChange?: (gridSpaceId: string, hasUnsavedChanges: boolean) => void // 通知未保存状态变化
  onSaveRequest?: (saveFunction: () => Promise<void>) => void // 注册保存函数
  isEditMode?: boolean // 编辑模式状态（从父组件传入）
  onEditModeToggle?: () => void // 编辑模式切换回调
}

// 默认网格配置
const GRID_CONFIG = {
  cols: { lg: 12, md: 10, sm: 6, xs: 4, xxs: 2 },
  rowHeight: 100,
  containerPadding: [16, 16] as [number, number],
  margin: [16, 16] as [number, number],
}

// 默认网格项大小（建议：宽4列，高4行）
const DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE = {
  w: 4,
  h: 4,
  minW: 3,
  minH: 3,
  maxW: 8,
  maxH: 8,
}

// 碰撞检测函数：检查新位置是否与现有项目重叠
const checkCollision = (
  x: number,
  y: number,
  w: number,
  h: number,
  existingItems: Layout[]
): boolean => {
  for (const item of existingItems) {
    // 检查是否重叠
    if (
      x < item.x + item.w &&
      x + w > item.x &&
      y < item.y + item.h &&
      y + h > item.y
    ) {
      return true // 有碰撞
    }
  }
  return false // 无碰撞
}

// 智能位置查找函数：优先横向排列，如果冲突则向下查找
const findNextAvailablePosition = (
  preferredX: number,
  preferredY: number,
  existingItems: Layout[],
  cols: number,
  itemWidth: number = DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.w,
  itemHeight: number = DEFAULT_ITEM_SIZE.h,
  maxAttempts: number = 50
): { x: number; y: number } => {
  // 首先尝试使用首选位置
  if (!checkCollision(preferredX, preferredY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
    return { x: preferredX, y: preferredY }
  }

  // 优先尝试横向排列（向右查找）
  for (let offset = 1; offset <= cols - itemWidth; offset++) {
    const tryX = preferredX + offset
    if (tryX + itemWidth <= cols) {
      if (!checkCollision(tryX, preferredY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
        return { x: tryX, y: preferredY }
      }
    }
  }

  // 如果横向排列失败，向下查找
  let tryY = preferredY
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maxAttempts; attempt++) {
    // 尝试在当前行找到位置
    for (let tryX = 0; tryX <= cols - itemWidth; tryX++) {
      if (!checkCollision(tryX, tryY, itemWidth, itemHeight, existingItems)) {
        return { x: tryX, y: tryY }
      }
    }
    // 如果当前行没有位置，向下移动一行
    tryY += itemHeight
  }

  // 如果所有尝试都失败，返回首选位置（让 react-grid-layout 处理）
  return { x: preferredX, y: preferredY }
}

export const AIGridLayout: React.FC<AIGridLayoutProps> = ({
  currentGridSpaceId,
  onLayoutChange,
  onCreateGridSpace,
  onGridSpaceCreated,
  onUnsavedChange,
  onSaveRequest,
  isEditMode: externalIsEditMode,
  onEditModeToggle,
}) => {
  const toast = useToast()
  const gridContainerRef = React.useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
  const gridItemRefs = useRef<Map<string, HTMLDivElement>>(new Map())
  const [gridItemsState, setGridItemsState] = useState<Map<string, GridItemData>>(new Map())
  const gridItemsRef = useRef(gridItemsState)
  const [layoutsState, setLayoutsState] = useState<Layouts>({
    lg: [],
    md: [],
    sm: [],
    xs: [],
    xxs: [],
  })
  const layoutsRef = useRef(layoutsState)

  const setGridItems = useCallback(
    (value: React.SetStateAction<Map<string, GridItemData>>) => {
      if (typeof value === "function") {
        setGridItemsState((prev) => {
          const next = (value as (prevState: Map<string, GridItemData>) => Map<string, GridItemData>)(prev)
          gridItemsRef.current = next
          return next
        })
      } else {
        gridItemsRef.current = value
        setGridItemsState(value)
      }
    },
    []
  )

  const setLayouts = useCallback(
    (value: React.SetStateAction<Layouts>) => {
      if (typeof value === "function") {
        setLayoutsState((prev) => {
          const next = (value as (prevState: Layouts) => Layouts)(prev)
          layoutsRef.current = next
          return next
        })
        return
      }
      layoutsRef.current = value
      setLayoutsState(value)
    },
    []
  )

  const gridItems = gridItemsState
  const layouts = layoutsState
  const [lastSavedData, setLastSavedData] = useState<string | null>(null) // 记录最后保存的数据
  const [hasUnsavedChanges, setHasUnsavedChanges] = useState(false) // 未保存状态
  const [gridMetadata, setGridMetadata] = useState<Record<string, any>>({})
  const [connectionList, setConnectionList] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [groupStructure, setGroupStructure] = useState<any[]>([])
  const [viewportState, setViewportState] = useState<Record<string, any>>({})
  const [layoutVersion, setLayoutVersion] = useState<number>(1)
  const buildPersistencePayload = useCallback(
    (
      itemsMap: Map<string, GridItemData>,
      layoutsSnapshot: Layouts,
      overrides?: {
        canvasMetadata?: Record<string, any>
        connectionList?: any[]
        groupStructure?: any[]
        viewportState?: Record<string, any>
        layoutVersion?: number
      }
    ) => {
      const layoutsWithoutStatic: Layouts = {}
      const layoutKeys = Object.keys(EMPTY_LAYOUTS) as (keyof Layouts)[]
      const layoutsClone: Layouts = {}
      layoutKeys.forEach((breakpoint) => {
        const layout = layoutsSnapshot?.[breakpoint]
        layoutsClone[breakpoint] = Array.isArray(layout) ? layout.map((item) => ({ ...item })) : []
      })

      ensureLayoutsCoverAllItems(layoutsClone, itemsMap)

      layoutKeys.forEach((breakpoint) => {
        const normalizedLayout = layoutsClone[breakpoint] || []
        layoutsWithoutStatic[breakpoint] = normalizedLayout.map(({ static: _static, ...rest }) => rest)
      })

      const itemsToSave = Array.from(itemsMap.values()).map((item) => ({
        ...item,
        disks: item.disks?.map((disk) => {
          const { latestResult, ...diskWithoutResult } = disk
          if (!latestResult) {
            return diskWithoutResult
          }
          const conclusionDetail = latestResult.conclusion_detail ?? ""
          // Only log in development mode or when explicitly debugging
          if (import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_SAVE === "true") {
            console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] buildPersistencePayload - Extracting conclusion_detail", {
              gridItemId: item.i,
              diskId: disk.id,
              conclusionDetailLength: conclusionDetail.length,
              conclusionDetailPreview: conclusionDetail.substring(0, 200),
              hasConclusionDetail: !!conclusionDetail,
            })
          }
          return {
            ...diskWithoutResult,
            latestResult: {
              id: latestResult.id,
              product_agent_id: latestResult.product_agent_id ?? null,
              graph_id:
                latestResult.graph_id !== undefined && latestResult.graph_id !== null
                  ? String(latestResult.graph_id)
                  : null,
              is_processed: latestResult.is_processed ?? false,
              conclusion_detail: conclusionDetail,
              created_at: latestResult.created_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
              updated_at: latestResult.updated_at ?? new Date().toISOString(),
            },
          }
        }),
      }))

      const metadataSource = overrides?.canvasMetadata ?? gridMetadata
      const payloadMetadata = {
        ...(metadataSource || {}),
        layouts: layoutsWithoutStatic,
      }

      const payload = {
        node_list: itemsToSave,
        canvas_metadata: payloadMetadata,
        connection_list: overrides?.connectionList ?? connectionList,
        group_structure: overrides?.groupStructure ?? groupStructure,
        viewport_state: overrides?.viewportState ?? viewportState,
        layout_version: overrides?.layoutVersion ?? layoutVersion,
      }

      return {
        payload,
        baselineString: JSON.stringify(payload),
        metadata: payloadMetadata,
      }
    },
    [gridMetadata, connectionList, groupStructure, viewportState, layoutVersion]
  )
  // 使用外部传入的编辑模式状态，如果没有则使用内部状态
  const isEditMode = externalIsEditMode ?? false
  const [selectedGridId, setSelectedGridId] = useState<string | null>(null) // 选中的 grid ID
  const [editingGridId, setEditingGridId] = useState<string | null>(null) // 正在编辑的 grid ID (for sidebar)
  const [editingLockId, setEditingLockId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const gridLayoutContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null) // Ref for ResponsiveGridLayout container
  const pendingTextEditsRef = useRef<Map<string, { diskId: number; markdown: string }>>(new Map())

  // Debug logging - More visible logging (only in debug mode)
  useEffect(() => {
    const shouldLog = import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_RENDER === "true"
    if (shouldLog) {
      console.log("🎨 ===== AIGridLayout RENDERED =====")
      console.log("🎨 AIGridLayout state:", {
        isEditMode,
        selectedGridId,
        editingGridId,
        currentGridSpaceId,
        gridItemsCount: gridItems.size,
        externalIsEditMode,
        hasOnEditModeToggle: !!onEditModeToggle,
      })
      console.log("🎨 ===== END AIGridLayout RENDER =====")
    }
  }, [isEditMode, selectedGridId, editingGridId, currentGridSpaceId, gridItems.size, externalIsEditMode, onEditModeToggle])

  // Log when component first mounts (only in debug mode)
  useEffect(() => {
    const shouldLog = import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_RENDER === "true"
    if (shouldLog) {
      console.log("🎨 AIGridLayout MOUNTED - Component initialized")
    }
  }, [])

  // Monitor container width to ensure WidthProvider uses correct width
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!gridLayoutContainerRef.current) return

    const container = gridLayoutContainerRef.current
    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
      for (const entry of entries) {
        void entry.contentRect

        // Force react-grid-layout to recalculate width
        // WidthProvider should automatically handle this, but we ensure it uses container width
        if (container) {
          // Trigger a resize event to notify WidthProvider
          window.dispatchEvent(new Event("resize"))
        }
      }
    })

    resizeObserver.observe(container)

    return () => {
      resizeObserver.disconnect()
    }
  }, [])

  // Auto-adjust grid item height based on content
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isEditMode) return // Don't auto-adjust in edit mode to allow manual resizing

    const resizeObservers = new Map<string, ResizeObserver>()

    gridItemRefs.current.forEach((element, itemId) => {
      const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
        for (const entry of entries) {
          const contentHeight = entry.contentRect.height
          const itemData = gridItemsRef.current.get(itemId)
          if (!itemData) continue

          // Get current layout for current breakpoint
          const currentBreakpoint = getCurrentBreakpoint()
          const currentLayout = layoutsRef.current[currentBreakpoint] || []
          const layoutItem = currentLayout.find(item => item.i === itemId)
          if (!layoutItem) continue

          // Calculate required height in grid rows
          // rowHeight + margin[1] is the height per row including margin
          const rowHeight = GRID_CONFIG.rowHeight
          const marginY = GRID_CONFIG.margin[1]
          const heightPerRow = rowHeight + marginY
          const requiredRows = Math.ceil((contentHeight + marginY) / heightPerRow)
          
          // Current height in rows
          const currentRows = layoutItem.h

          // If content requires more rows than current, update height
          if (requiredRows > currentRows) {
            console.log(`📏 [AIGridLayout] Auto-adjusting height for item ${itemId}:`, {
              contentHeight,
              currentRows,
              requiredRows,
              rowHeight,
              marginY,
            })

            // Update layout for all breakpoints
            setLayouts((prevLayouts) => {
              const updatedLayouts: Layouts = { ...prevLayouts }
              Object.keys(updatedLayouts).forEach((breakpoint) => {
                const layout = updatedLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] || []
                const updatedLayout = layout.map((item) => {
                  if (item.i === itemId) {
                    return {
                      ...item,
                      h: requiredRows,
                    }
                  }
                  return item
                })
                updatedLayouts[breakpoint as keyof Layouts] = updatedLayout
              })
              return updatedLayouts
            })

            // Update gridItems to reflect new height
            setGridItems((prevItems) => {
              const item = prevItems.get(itemId)
              if (!item) return prevItems
              const updatedItems = new Map(prevItems)
              updatedItems.set(itemId, {
                ...item,
                h: requiredRows,
              })
              return updatedItems
            })
          }
        }
      })

      resizeObserver.observe(element)
      resizeObservers.set(itemId, resizeObserver)
    })

    return () => {
      resizeObservers.forEach((observer) => {
        observer.disconnect()
      })
      resizeObservers.clear()
    }
  }, [gridItems, layouts, isEditMode])

  // Helper function to get current breakpoint
  const getCurrentBreakpoint = useCallback(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return 'lg'
    const width = window.innerWidth
    if (width >= 1200) return 'lg'
    if (width >= 996) return 'md'
    if (width >= 768) return 'sm'
    if (width >= 480) return 'xs'
    return 'xxs'
  }, [])

  // Load grid layout data from database
  useEffect(() => {
    if (currentGridSpaceId) {
      loadGridSpaceData(currentGridSpaceId)
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      setLastSavedData(null)
    } else {
      // Clear grid items when no space is selected
      setGridItems(new Map())
      setLayouts({
        lg: [],
        md: [],
        sm: [],
        xs: [],
        xxs: [],
      })
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      setLastSavedData(null)
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId])

  const loadGridSpaceData = useCallback(async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - START", {
      gridSpaceId,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    })
    try {
      const gridSpace = await GridSpaceService.getGridSpace(gridSpaceId)
      const loadedItemIds = (gridSpace.node_list || []).map((item: any) => item.i)
      console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - GridSpace loaded", {
        gridSpaceId,
        nodeListCount: gridSpace.node_list?.length ?? 0,
        loadedItemIds: loadedItemIds.slice(0, 10), // Show first 10 IDs to avoid log spam
        totalItemIds: loadedItemIds.length,
      })

      let processedMetadata: Record<string, any>
      try {
        processedMetadata = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(gridSpace.canvas_metadata || {}))
      } catch {
        processedMetadata = { ...(gridSpace.canvas_metadata || {}) }
      }

      let nodeListRaw: GridItemData[] = Array.isArray(gridSpace.node_list)
        ? (gridSpace.node_list as GridItemData[])
        : []
      
      console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Parsed node_list", {
        gridSpaceId,
        nodeListRawCount: nodeListRaw.length,
        nodeListRawItemIds: nodeListRaw.map(item => item.i).slice(0, 10), // Show first 10 IDs
        hasLayouts: !!processedMetadata.layouts,
      })
      
      let layoutsSource: Layouts | null =
        (processedMetadata.layouts as Layouts | undefined) ?? null

      const legacySnapshot = processedMetadata.legacy_grid_layout_data
      if (
        (!layoutsSource ||
          Object.values(layoutsSource).every(
            (value) => !Array.isArray(value) || value.length === 0,
          )) &&
        legacySnapshot
      ) {
        try {
          const legacyData =
            typeof legacySnapshot === "string"
              ? JSON.parse(legacySnapshot)
              : legacySnapshot
          if (legacyData && typeof legacyData === "object") {
            if (!layoutsSource && legacyData.layouts) {
              layoutsSource = legacyData.layouts as Layouts
            }
            if ((!nodeListRaw || nodeListRaw.length === 0) && Array.isArray(legacyData.items)) {
              nodeListRaw = legacyData.items as GridItemData[]
            }
          }
        } catch (parseError) {
          console.warn("Failed to parse legacy grid layout data:", parseError)
        }
      }

      const itemsMap = new Map<string, GridItemData>()
      const itemsArray: GridItemData[] = Array.isArray(nodeListRaw) ? nodeListRaw : []

      const resultIdsToLoad: number[] = []
      const diskIdToResultIdMap = new Map<number, number>()

      itemsArray.forEach((rawItem) => {
        if (!rawItem || typeof rawItem !== "object" || !rawItem.i) {
          return
        }
        const item = { ...rawItem, source: "space" as const } // Mark as loaded from space
        itemsMap.set(item.i, item)

        if (item.disks && Array.isArray(item.disks)) {
          item.disks.forEach((disk) => {
            // Log saved conclusion_detail from node_list (only in debug mode to reduce noise)
            const shouldLogDetails = import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_SAVE === "true"
            if (shouldLogDetails && disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail) {
              console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Found saved conclusion_detail in node_list", {
                gridItemId: item.i,
                diskId: disk.id,
                conclusionDetailLength: disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail.length,
                conclusionDetailPreview: disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail.substring(0, 200),
                hasLatestResult: !!disk.latestResult,
              })
            }
            if (disk?.latestResultId && disk.category !== "dashboard") {
              resultIdsToLoad.push(disk.latestResultId)
              diskIdToResultIdMap.set(disk.id, disk.latestResultId)
            }
          })
        }
      })
      
      const normalizedLayouts = normalizeLayouts(layoutsSource)
      ensureLayoutsCoverAllItems(normalizedLayouts, itemsMap)
      processedMetadata.layouts = normalizedLayouts
      if (processedMetadata.legacy_grid_layout_data) {
        delete processedMetadata.legacy_grid_layout_data
      }
      
      // Log summary of loaded items
      const itemsWithLatestResultId = Array.from(itemsMap.values()).filter(item => 
        item.disks?.some(disk => disk.latestResultId)
      )
      const itemsWithoutLatestResultId = Array.from(itemsMap.values()).filter(item => 
        !item.disks?.some(disk => disk.latestResultId)
      )
      const itemsWithSourceSpace = Array.from(itemsMap.values()).filter(item => 
        item.source === "space"
      )
      const itemsWithSourceNew = Array.from(itemsMap.values()).filter(item => 
        item.source === "new"
      )
      
      console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Items parsed from node_list", {
        gridSpaceId,
        itemsCount: itemsMap.size,
        itemIds: Array.from(itemsMap.keys()).slice(0, 10), // Show first 10 IDs
        itemsWithLatestResultId: itemsWithLatestResultId.length,
        itemsWithoutLatestResultId: itemsWithoutLatestResultId.length,
        itemsWithSourceSpace: itemsWithSourceSpace.length,
        itemsWithSourceNew: itemsWithSourceNew.length,
        itemsWithSourceUndefined: itemsMap.size - itemsWithSourceSpace.length - itemsWithSourceNew.length,
        // Log items that might be filtered out (no latestResultId and not dashboard)
        itemsAtRisk: itemsWithoutLatestResultId
          .filter(item => !item.disks?.some(disk => disk.category === "dashboard"))
          .map(item => ({ itemId: item.i, diskCount: item.disks?.length ?? 0 })),
      })

      if (resultIdsToLoad.length > 0) {
        try {
          const diskIds = Array.from(
            new Set(
              itemsArray
                .flatMap((item) => item.disks?.map((disk) => disk.id) || [])
                .filter((id): id is number => typeof id === "number"),
            ),
          )

          const diskResultsPromises = diskIds.map(async (diskId) => {
            try {
              const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(diskId)
              return { diskId, results }
            } catch (error) {
              console.error(`Failed to load results for disk ${diskId}:`, error)
              return { diskId, results: [] }
            }
          })

          const diskResultsArray = await Promise.all(diskResultsPromises)
          const diskResultsMap = new Map<number, any[]>(
            diskResultsArray.map(({ diskId, results }) => [diskId, results]),
          )

          // Define shouldLogDetails once for the entire loop to avoid repeated checks
          const shouldLogDetails = import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_SAVE === "true"
          
          itemsMap.forEach((item, itemId) => {
            if (item.disks && Array.isArray(item.disks)) {
              // Filter out questionnaire type disks
              const filteredDisks = item.disks.filter(
                (disk) => disk && typeof disk === "object" && disk.category !== "questionnaire"
              )

              // If all disks are filtered out, remove the entire item
              if (filteredDisks.length === 0) {
                console.warn("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Removing item (all disks filtered out)", {
                  gridSpaceId,
                  itemId,
                  originalDiskCount: item.disks?.length ?? 0,
                  filteredDiskCount: filteredDisks.length,
                  itemSource: item.source,
                })
                itemsMap.delete(itemId)
                return
              }
              
              // Log if disks were filtered out
              if (filteredDisks.length < (item.disks?.length ?? 0)) {
                console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Some disks filtered out", {
                  gridSpaceId,
                  itemId,
                  originalDiskCount: item.disks?.length ?? 0,
                  filteredDiskCount: filteredDisks.length,
                  filteredOutCount: (item.disks?.length ?? 0) - filteredDisks.length,
                })
              }

              const updatedDisks = filteredDisks.map((disk) => {
                if (!disk || typeof disk !== "object") {
                  return disk
                }
                // Handle dashboard type disks - re-parse requirement to ensure proper sorting
                if (disk.category === "dashboard") {
                  try {
                    if (disk.requirement) {
                      try {
                        const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
                        if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
                          // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
                          const dashboardCharts = charts
                            .filter((chart: any) => chart.echarts_option)
                            .map((chart: any) => ({
                              chart_type: chart.chart_type || "unknown",
                              question_title: chart.question_title || "Untitled Chart",
                              echarts_option: chart.echarts_option,
                              echarts_template: chart.echarts_template,
                              queries: chart.queries,
                              data_source: chart.data_source,
                              created_at: chart.created_at,
                              pinned_at: chart.pinned_at,
                              pinned_by: chart.pinned_by,
                            }))
                            // Sort by pinned_at (or created_at as fallback) in descending order (newest first)
                            .sort((a: any, b: any) => {
                              const timeA = a.pinned_at || a.created_at || ""
                              const timeB = b.pinned_at || b.created_at || ""
                              // Compare timestamps in descending order (newest first)
                              return timeB.localeCompare(timeA)
                            })

                          if (dashboardCharts.length > 0) {
                            return {
                              ...disk,
                              dashboardCharts,
                              dashboardError: undefined,
                              latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
                            }
                          } else {
                            return {
                              ...disk,
                              dashboardCharts: undefined,
                              dashboardError: "No valid chart configuration found in requirement",
                              latestResultId: null,
                            }
                          }
                        } else {
                          return {
                            ...disk,
                            dashboardCharts: undefined,
                            dashboardError: "Requirement is not a valid array",
                            latestResultId: null,
                          }
                        }
                      } catch (parseError) {
                        console.error(
                          `Failed to parse dashboard requirement for disk ${disk.id}:`,
                          parseError
                        )
                        return {
                          ...disk,
                          dashboardCharts: undefined,
                          dashboardError: `Failed to parse requirement: ${parseError instanceof Error ? parseError.message : "Unknown error"}`,
                          latestResultId: null,
                        }
                      }
                    } else {
                      return {
                        ...disk,
                        dashboardCharts: undefined,
                        dashboardError: "Requirement field is empty",
                        latestResultId: null,
                      }
                    }
                  } catch (error) {
                    console.error(`Failed to process dashboard disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
                    return {
                      ...disk,
                      dashboardCharts: undefined,
                      dashboardError: `Failed to process dashboard: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
                      latestResultId: null,
                    }
                  }
                }
                const latestResultId = disk.latestResultId ?? diskIdToResultIdMap.get(disk.id)
                if (!latestResultId) {
                  // New items (dragged) may not have latestResultId - use savedResult directly
                  if (shouldLogDetails) {
                    console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - No latestResultId, using savedResult", {
                      gridItemId: itemId,
                      diskId: disk.id,
                      hasSavedResult: !!disk.latestResult,
                      savedConclusionDetailLength: disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail?.length ?? 0,
                    })
                  }
                  // CRITICAL: For new items without latestResultId, preserve the savedResult completely
                  // This ensures newly dragged items are not lost
                  return {
                    ...disk,
                    latestResult: disk.latestResult ?? null,
                  }
                }
                const results = diskResultsMap.get(disk.id) || []
                const dbLatestResult = results.find((r: any) => r.id === latestResultId) || null
                // Priority: use saved conclusion_detail from grid_space, only supplement other fields from database
                const savedResult = disk.latestResult
                
                // Only log in debug mode to reduce noise
                if (shouldLogDetails) {
                  console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Merging savedResult and dbLatestResult", {
                    gridItemId: itemId,
                    diskId: disk.id,
                    latestResultId,
                    hasSavedResult: !!savedResult,
                    savedConclusionDetailLength: savedResult?.conclusion_detail?.length ?? 0,
                    savedConclusionDetailPreview: savedResult?.conclusion_detail?.substring(0, 200) ?? "",
                    hasDbLatestResult: !!dbLatestResult,
                    dbConclusionDetailLength: dbLatestResult?.conclusion_detail?.length ?? 0,
                    dbConclusionDetailPreview: dbLatestResult?.conclusion_detail?.substring(0, 200) ?? "",
                  })
                }
                
                if (savedResult && savedResult.conclusion_detail && dbLatestResult) {
                  if (shouldLogDetails) {
                    console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Using saved conclusion_detail (both exist)", {
                      gridItemId: itemId,
                      diskId: disk.id,
                      savedConclusionDetailLength: savedResult.conclusion_detail.length,
                    })
                  }
                  return {
                    ...disk,
                    latestResult: {
                      ...dbLatestResult,
                      conclusion_detail: savedResult.conclusion_detail, // Preserve saved styled content
                    },
                  }
                }
                
                // If savedResult has conclusion_detail but dbLatestResult doesn't exist, still use savedResult
                if (savedResult && savedResult.conclusion_detail && !dbLatestResult) {
                  if (shouldLogDetails) {
                    console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Using saved conclusion_detail (no dbLatestResult)", {
                      gridItemId: itemId,
                      diskId: disk.id,
                      savedConclusionDetailLength: savedResult.conclusion_detail.length,
                    })
                  }
                  return {
                    ...disk,
                    latestResult: savedResult,
                  }
                }
                
                // If dbLatestResult exists but savedResult doesn't have conclusion_detail, use dbLatestResult
                if (dbLatestResult && (!savedResult || !savedResult.conclusion_detail)) {
                  if (shouldLogDetails) {
                    console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Using dbLatestResult (no saved conclusion_detail)", {
                      gridItemId: itemId,
                      diskId: disk.id,
                      dbConclusionDetailLength: dbLatestResult.conclusion_detail?.length ?? 0,
                    })
                  }
                  return {
                    ...disk,
                    latestResult: dbLatestResult,
                  }
                }
                
                if (shouldLogDetails) {
                  console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Fallback to savedResult or null", {
                    gridItemId: itemId,
                    diskId: disk.id,
                    hasSavedResult: !!savedResult,
                    hasDbLatestResult: !!dbLatestResult,
                  })
                }
                return {
                  ...disk,
                  latestResult: dbLatestResult ?? savedResult ?? null,
                }
              })

              itemsMap.set(itemId, {
                ...item,
                disks: updatedDisks,
              })
            }
          })
        } catch (resultError) {
          console.error("Failed to batch load execution results:", resultError)
        }
      }

      // Track items that might be filtered out
      const itemsBeforeFilter = itemsMap.size
      
      console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Setting gridItems and layouts", {
        gridSpaceId,
        itemsCount: itemsMap.size,
        layoutsCount: Object.keys(normalizedLayouts).length,
        itemIds: Array.from(itemsMap.keys()).slice(0, 10), // Show first 10 IDs
        itemsBeforeFilter,
      })
      
      setGridItems(itemsMap)
      setLayouts(normalizedLayouts)
      
      const itemsAfterFilter = itemsMap.size
      if (itemsBeforeFilter !== itemsAfterFilter) {
        console.warn("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - Items were filtered out", {
          gridSpaceId,
          itemsBeforeFilter,
          itemsAfterFilter,
          filteredCount: itemsBeforeFilter - itemsAfterFilter,
        })
      }
      
      console.log("📥 [AIGridLayout] loadGridSpaceData - SUCCESS", {
        gridSpaceId,
        itemsCount: itemsMap.size,
        finalItemIds: Array.from(itemsMap.keys()).slice(0, 10), // Show first 10 IDs
      })

      const processedConnectionList = Array.isArray(gridSpace.connection_list)
        ? gridSpace.connection_list
        : []
      const processedGroupStructure = Array.isArray(gridSpace.group_structure)
        ? gridSpace.group_structure
        : []
      const processedViewportState =
        gridSpace.viewport_state && typeof gridSpace.viewport_state === "object"
          ? gridSpace.viewport_state
          : {}
      const processedLayoutVersion =
        typeof gridSpace.layout_version === "number" ? gridSpace.layout_version : 1

      setConnectionList(processedConnectionList)
      setGroupStructure(processedGroupStructure)
      setViewportState(processedViewportState)
      setLayoutVersion(processedLayoutVersion)
      setGridMetadata(processedMetadata)

      const { baselineString } = buildPersistencePayload(itemsMap, normalizedLayouts, {
        canvasMetadata: processedMetadata,
        connectionList: processedConnectionList,
        groupStructure: processedGroupStructure,
        viewportState: processedViewportState,
        layoutVersion: processedLayoutVersion,
      })
      setLastSavedData(baselineString)
      setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
      onUnsavedChange?.(gridSpaceId, false)
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid space data:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid space data",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [toast, buildPersistencePayload, onUnsavedChange])

  const getLatestSnapshot = useCallback(
    (overrides?: { items?: Map<string, GridItemData>; layouts?: Layouts }) => {
      return {
        items: overrides?.items ?? gridItemsRef.current,
        layouts: overrides?.layouts ?? layoutsRef.current,
        metadata: gridMetadata,
        connectionList,
        groupStructure,
        viewportState,
        layoutVersion,
      }
    },
    [gridMetadata, connectionList, groupStructure, viewportState, layoutVersion]
  )

  // Save grid layout data to database (manual save)
  // Note: static property is a runtime property and should not be saved
  const saveGridSpaceData = useCallback(
    async (overrides?: { items?: Map<string, GridItemData>; layouts?: Layouts }) => {
      if (!currentGridSpaceId) {
        toast({
          title: "Error",
          description: "No grid space selected",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      const snapshot = getLatestSnapshot(overrides)
      const { items, layouts, metadata, connectionList: snapConnections, groupStructure: snapGroups, viewportState: snapViewport, layoutVersion: snapVersion } = snapshot

      try {
        // Always log save start
        console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] saveGridSpaceData - Building payload", {
          currentGridSpaceId,
          itemsCount: items.size,
          hasOverrides: !!overrides,
          itemIds: Array.from(items.keys()),
          layoutsBreakpoints: Object.keys(layouts),
        })
        
        // Verify that items map is not empty
        if (items.size === 0) {
          console.warn("💾 [AIGridLayout] saveGridSpaceData - WARNING: items map is empty", {
            currentGridSpaceId,
            hasOverrides: !!overrides,
            gridItemsRefSize: gridItemsRef.current.size,
            layoutsRefSize: Object.keys(layoutsRef.current).length,
          })
          // Don't save empty data, but don't throw error either
          return
        }

        const { payload, baselineString } = buildPersistencePayload(items, layouts, {
          canvasMetadata: metadata,
          connectionList: snapConnections,
          groupStructure: snapGroups,
          viewportState: snapViewport,
          layoutVersion: snapVersion,
        })

        // Always log payload summary
        console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] saveGridSpaceData - Payload built", {
          currentGridSpaceId,
          nodeListCount: payload.node_list?.length ?? 0,
          nodeListIds: payload.node_list?.map((item: any) => item.i) || [],
        })

        // Log conclusion_detail values in payload (only in debug mode to reduce noise)
        const shouldLogDetails = import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_SAVE === "true"
        if (shouldLogDetails) {
          const nodeList = payload.node_list || []
          nodeList.forEach((item: any) => {
            if (item.disks && Array.isArray(item.disks)) {
              item.disks.forEach((disk: any) => {
                if (disk.latestResult) {
                  console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] saveGridSpaceData - Payload conclusion_detail", {
                    gridItemId: item.i,
                    diskId: disk.id,
                    conclusionDetailLength: disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail?.length ?? 0,
                    conclusionDetailPreview: disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail?.substring(0, 200) ?? "",
                    hasConclusionDetail: !!disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail,
                  })
                }
              })
            }
          })
        }

        console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] saveGridSpaceData - Calling autoSaveGridSpace", {
          currentGridSpaceId,
          nodeListCount: payload.node_list?.length ?? 0,
        })

        await GridSpaceService.autoSaveGridSpace(currentGridSpaceId, payload)

        console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] saveGridSpaceData - autoSaveGridSpace SUCCESS", {
          currentGridSpaceId,
          nodeListCount: payload.node_list?.length ?? 0,
          savedItemIds: payload.node_list?.map((item: any) => item.i) || [],
        })

        // Verify save by querying database (only in development or when explicitly debugging)
        const shouldVerify = import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_SAVE === "true"
        if (shouldVerify) {
          try {
            const verifyGridSpace = await GridSpaceService.getGridSpace(currentGridSpaceId)
            const savedItemIds = new Set(payload.node_list?.map((item: any) => item.i) || [])
            const loadedItemIds = new Set((verifyGridSpace.node_list || []).map((item: any) => item.i))
            const missingItems = Array.from(savedItemIds).filter(id => !loadedItemIds.has(id))
            const extraItems = Array.from(loadedItemIds).filter(id => !savedItemIds.has(id))
            
            if (missingItems.length > 0 || extraItems.length > 0) {
              console.warn("💾 [AIGridLayout] saveGridSpaceData - Verification mismatch", {
                currentGridSpaceId,
                savedCount: savedItemIds.size,
                loadedCount: loadedItemIds.size,
                missingItems,
                extraItems,
              })
            } else {
              console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] saveGridSpaceData - Verification PASSED", {
                currentGridSpaceId,
                itemCount: savedItemIds.size,
              })
            }
          } catch (verifyError) {
            console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] saveGridSpaceData - Verification failed", {
              currentGridSpaceId,
              error: verifyError,
            })
          }
        }

        setGridMetadata(metadata)
        setLastSavedData(baselineString)
        setHasUnsavedChanges(false)
        onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, false)
        
        toast({
          title: "Saved",
          description: "Grid space saved successfully",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to save grid space:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Failed to save grid space",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        throw error
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, toast, onUnsavedChange, buildPersistencePayload, getLatestSnapshot]
  )

  // Register save function with parent component
  useEffect(() => {
    if (onSaveRequest && currentGridSpaceId) {
      onSaveRequest(saveGridSpaceData)
    }
  }, [onSaveRequest, currentGridSpaceId, saveGridSpaceData])

  // Check for unsaved changes
  const checkUnsavedChanges = useCallback(() => {
    if (!currentGridSpaceId) return

    const snapshot = getLatestSnapshot()
    const { baselineString } = buildPersistencePayload(snapshot.items, snapshot.layouts, {
      canvasMetadata: snapshot.metadata,
      connectionList: snapshot.connectionList,
      groupStructure: snapshot.groupStructure,
      viewportState: snapshot.viewportState,
      layoutVersion: snapshot.layoutVersion,
    })
    
    const hasChanges = lastSavedData !== baselineString
    if (hasChanges !== hasUnsavedChanges) {
      setHasUnsavedChanges(hasChanges)
      onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, hasChanges)
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, lastSavedData, hasUnsavedChanges, onUnsavedChange, buildPersistencePayload, getLatestSnapshot])

  // Debounce checkUnsavedChanges to avoid frequent calls
  const checkUnsavedChangesDebouncedRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null)
  const checkUnsavedChangesDebounced = useCallback(() => {
    if (checkUnsavedChangesDebouncedRef.current) {
      clearTimeout(checkUnsavedChangesDebouncedRef.current)
    }
    checkUnsavedChangesDebouncedRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
      checkUnsavedChanges()
      checkUnsavedChangesDebouncedRef.current = null
    }, 500) // 500ms debounce
  }, [checkUnsavedChanges])

  // Cleanup debounce timer on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (checkUnsavedChangesDebouncedRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(checkUnsavedChangesDebouncedRef.current)
      }
    }
  }, [])

  // Check for unsaved changes whenever data changes (with debounce)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (currentGridSpaceId && lastSavedData !== null) {
      checkUnsavedChangesDebounced()
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, gridItemsState, layoutsState, lastSavedData, checkUnsavedChangesDebounced])

  const handleApplicationDrop = useCallback(async (
    application: any,
    gridX: number,
    gridY: number,
    targetGridSpaceId?: string | null
  ) => {
    console.log("🎯 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - START:", {
      application: application?.name,
      gridX,
      gridY,
      targetGridSpaceId,
      currentGridSpaceId,
      gridItemsCount: gridItems.size,
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    })

    // Log dimensions before adding items (simplified to avoid interfering with drag-drop)
    // Record key values for comparison
    let beforeValues: any = null
    if (gridLayoutContainerRef.current) {
      const container = gridLayoutContainerRef.current
      const containerRect = container.getBoundingClientRect()
      const parent = container.parentElement
      const parentRect = parent ? parent.getBoundingClientRect() : null
      
      // Get root and sidebar info (safe queries, no interference)
      let rootRect = null
      let sidebarRect = null
      try {
        const root = document.querySelector('[data-root="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
        const sidebar = document.querySelector('[data-sidebar="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
        if (root) rootRect = root.getBoundingClientRect()
        if (sidebar) sidebarRect = sidebar.getBoundingClientRect()
      } catch (e) {
        // Ignore errors during drag
      }
      
      beforeValues = {
        container: {
          offsetWidth: container.offsetWidth,
          clientWidth: container.clientWidth,
          scrollWidth: container.scrollWidth,
          offsetLeft: container.offsetLeft,
          scrollLeft: container.scrollLeft,
          boundingRect: {
            left: containerRect.left,
            top: containerRect.top,
            right: containerRect.right,
            bottom: containerRect.bottom,
            width: containerRect.width,
            height: containerRect.height,
          },
        },
        parent: parent ? {
          offsetWidth: parent.offsetWidth,
          clientWidth: parent.clientWidth,
          scrollWidth: parent.scrollWidth,
          offsetLeft: parent.offsetLeft,
          scrollLeft: parent.scrollLeft,
          boundingRect: parentRect ? {
            left: parentRect.left,
            top: parentRect.top,
            right: parentRect.right,
            bottom: parentRect.bottom,
            width: parentRect.width,
            height: parentRect.height,
          } : null,
        } : null,
        document: {
          scrollLeft: document.documentElement.scrollLeft,
          scrollTop: document.documentElement.scrollTop,
          bodyScrollLeft: document.body.scrollLeft,
          bodyScrollTop: document.body.scrollTop,
        },
        window: {
          innerWidth: window.innerWidth,
          outerWidth: window.outerWidth,
          documentWidth: document.documentElement.clientWidth,
          scrollX: window.scrollX,
          scrollY: window.scrollY,
        },
        rootContainer: rootRect ? {
          left: rootRect.left,
          top: rootRect.top,
          right: rootRect.right,
          bottom: rootRect.bottom,
          width: rootRect.width,
          height: rootRect.height,
        } : null,
        sidebar: sidebarRect ? {
          left: sidebarRect.left,
          top: sidebarRect.top,
          right: sidebarRect.right,
          bottom: sidebarRect.bottom,
          width: sidebarRect.width,
          height: sidebarRect.height,
        } : null,
      }
      
      console.log("📐 [AIGridLayout] handleApplicationDrop - BEFORE Adding Items:", beforeValues)
    }
    // 使用传入的 targetGridSpaceId，如果没有则使用 currentGridSpaceId
    const spaceId = targetGridSpaceId || currentGridSpaceId
    if (!spaceId) {
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "No grid space selected",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return
    }
    try {
      // Get complete application information
      const completeApp = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(application.id)

      // Filter disk children - exclude questionnaire type disks
      const disks = completeApp.children?.filter(
        (child) => child.node_type === "disk" && child.category !== "questionnaire"
      ) || []

      // Process disks - save full disk object, only save latestResultId
      const disksWithResults = await Promise.all(
        disks.map(async (disk) => {
          // Handle dashboard type disks - parse requirement to dashboardCharts
          if (disk.category === "dashboard") {
            try {
              // Parse requirement field for dashboard charts
              if (disk.requirement) {
                try {
                  const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
                  if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
                    // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
                    const dashboardCharts = charts
                      .filter((chart: any) => chart.echarts_option)
                      .map((chart: any) => ({
                        chart_type: chart.chart_type || "unknown",
                        question_title: chart.question_title || "Untitled Chart",
                        echarts_option: chart.echarts_option,
                        echarts_template: chart.echarts_template,
                        queries: chart.queries,
                        data_source: chart.data_source,
                        created_at: chart.created_at,
                        pinned_at: chart.pinned_at,
                        pinned_by: chart.pinned_by,
                      }))
```
