```typescriptreact
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        })
      }
      pendingTextEditsRef.current.delete(gridItemId)
      
      // First, check if item exists in current gridItems
      const currentItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
      if (!currentItem) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Item not found in gridItems", {
          gridItemId,
          availableItems: Array.from(gridItems.keys()),
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Grid item not found. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Check if disk exists
      const targetDisk = currentItem.disks.find((d) => d.id === diskId)
      if (!targetDisk) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Disk not found", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId,
          availableDisks: currentItem.disks.map((d) => d.id),
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Disk not found. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      if (!targetDisk.latestResult) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - latestResult not found", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId,
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Execution result not found. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Directly build updatedItems without relying on setGridItems callback
      console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Building updatedItems directly", {
        gridItemId,
        diskId,
        currentItemsCount: gridItems.size,
      })

      // Create a new Map with updated disk
      const updatedItems = new Map(gridItems)
      const item = updatedItems.get(gridItemId)
      
      if (!item) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Item not found when building updatedItems", {
          gridItemId,
          availableItems: Array.from(updatedItems.keys()),
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Grid item not found when updating. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Update the specific disk
      const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
        if (disk.id !== diskId) {
          return disk
        }

        if (!disk.latestResult) {
          console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - latestResult not found for disk in updatedItems", {
            gridItemId,
            diskId: disk.id,
          })
          return disk
        }

        const updatedDisk: typeof disk = {
          ...disk,
          latestResult: {
            ...disk.latestResult,
            conclusion_detail: markdown,
            updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          },
        }
        console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Updated disk conclusion_detail", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId: disk.id,
          oldConclusionDetailLength: disk.latestResult.conclusion_detail?.length ?? 0,
          newConclusionDetailLength: markdown.length,
          conclusionDetailPreview: markdown.substring(0, 200),
        })
        return updatedDisk
      })

      // Verify that the disk was actually updated
      const wasUpdated = updatedDisks.some((disk) => {
        if (disk.id !== diskId) return false
        return disk.latestResult?.conclusion_detail === markdown
      })

      if (!wasUpdated) {
        console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Disk was not updated", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId,
          targetDiskId: targetDisk.id,
          targetDiskIdType: typeof targetDisk.id,
        })
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Failed to update grid item. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 5000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Update the item with new disks
      const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
        ...item,
        disks: updatedDisks,
      }
      updatedItems.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)

      // Update React state (for UI update)
      setGridItems(updatedItems)

      if (persistToSpace && currentGridSpaceId) {
        try {
          const shouldLog = import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_SAVE === "true"
          if (shouldLog) {
            console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Calling saveGridSpaceData", {
              gridItemId,
              diskId,
              currentGridSpaceId,
              updatedItemsCount: updatedItems.size,
            })
          }
          await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
          if (shouldLog) {
            console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - saveGridSpaceData SUCCESS", {
              gridItemId,
              diskId,
              currentGridSpaceId,
            })
          }
          pendingTextEditsRef.current.delete(gridItemId)
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - saveGridSpaceData ERROR", {
            gridItemId,
            diskId,
            currentGridSpaceId,
            error,
          })
          setHasUnsavedChanges(true)
          if (currentGridSpaceId) {
            onUnsavedChange?.(currentGridSpaceId, true)
          }
          toast({
            title: "Save Failed",
            description: "Failed to save text changes. Please try again.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
        }
      } else {
        console.log("💾 [AIGridLayout] handleTextEditCommit - Skipping persist", {
          gridItemId,
          diskId,
          persistToSpace,
          currentGridSpaceId,
        })
      }
    },
    [currentGridSpaceId, gridItems, onUnsavedChange, saveGridSpaceData, toast]
  )

  // Handle grid cut
  const [runModalState, setRunModalState] = useState<{
    isOpen: boolean
    gridItemId: string | null
    disk: GridItemData["disks"][number] | null
  }>({
    isOpen: false,
    gridItemId: null,
    disk: null,
  })

  // Helper function to parse dashboard requirement
  const parseDashboardRequirement = useCallback((disk: any) => {
    try {
      if (disk.category === "dashboard" && disk.requirement) {
        try {
          const charts = JSON.parse(disk.requirement)
          if (Array.isArray(charts) && charts.length > 0) {
            // Validate and extract echarts_option from each chart
            const dashboardCharts = charts
              .filter((chart: any) => chart.echarts_option)
              .map((chart: any) => ({
                chart_type: chart.chart_type || "unknown",
                question_title: chart.question_title || "Untitled Chart",
                echarts_option: chart.echarts_option,
                echarts_template: chart.echarts_template,
                queries: chart.queries,
                data_source: chart.data_source,
                created_at: chart.created_at,
                pinned_at: chart.pinned_at,
                pinned_by: chart.pinned_by,
              }))
              // Sort by pinned_at (or created_at as fallback) in descending order (newest first)
              .sort((a: any, b: any) => {
                const timeA = a.pinned_at || a.created_at || ""
                const timeB = b.pinned_at || b.created_at || ""
                // Compare timestamps in descending order (newest first)
                return timeB.localeCompare(timeA)
              })

            if (dashboardCharts.length > 0) {
              return {
                dashboardCharts,
                dashboardError: undefined,
              }
            } else {
              return {
                dashboardCharts: undefined,
                dashboardError: "No valid chart configuration found in requirement",
              }
            }
          } else {
            return {
              dashboardCharts: undefined,
              dashboardError: "Requirement is not a valid array",
            }
          }
        } catch (parseError) {
          console.error(
            `Failed to parse dashboard requirement for disk ${disk.id}:`,
            parseError
          )
          return {
            dashboardCharts: undefined,
            dashboardError: `Failed to parse requirement: ${parseError instanceof Error ? parseError.message : "Unknown error"}`,
          }
        }
      } else {
        return {
          dashboardCharts: undefined,
          dashboardError: "Requirement field is empty",
        }
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(`Failed to process dashboard disk ${disk.id}:`, error)
      return {
        dashboardCharts: undefined,
        dashboardError: `Failed to process dashboard: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"}`,
      }
    }
  }, [])

  const handleRefreshDisk = useCallback(
    async ({ gridItemId, diskId }: { gridItemId: string; diskId: number }) => {
      try {
        // Get current disk info to check its category
        const currentItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
        if (!currentItem) {
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Grid item not found.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        const currentDisk = currentItem.disks.find((d) => d.id === diskId)
        if (!currentDisk) {
          toast({
            title: "Error",
            description: "Disk not found.",
            status: "error",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Handle dashboard type disks - refresh by re-parsing requirement
        if (currentDisk.category === "dashboard") {
          // Fetch latest disk data from database (including updated requirement)
          const updatedDiskData = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(diskId)

          // Parse requirement to generate dashboardCharts
          const { dashboardCharts, dashboardError } = parseDashboardRequirement(updatedDiskData)

          // Update gridItems with refreshed dashboard data
          setGridItems((prev) => {
            const next = new Map(prev)
            const item = next.get(gridItemId)
            if (!item) {
              return prev
            }

            const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
              if (disk.id !== diskId) {
                return disk
              }
              return {
                ...disk,
                ...updatedDiskData, // Update with latest disk data
                dashboardCharts,
                dashboardError,
                latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
              }
            })

            const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
              ...item,
              disks: updatedDisks,
            }
            next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
            return next
          })

          toast({
            title: "Refreshed",
            description: "Dashboard charts have been refreshed with the latest configuration.",
            status: "success",
            duration: 2000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Handle regular disks - refresh latest execution result
        const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(diskId)
        
        if (!results || results.length === 0) {
          toast({
            title: "No results found",
            description: "This disk does not have any execution results yet.",
            status: "info",
            duration: 3000,
          })
          return
        }

        // Get the latest result (first one in the array, as they are sorted by created_at desc)
        const latestResult = results[0]

        // Update gridItems with the new latestResult
        setGridItems((prev) => {
          const next = new Map(prev)
          const item = next.get(gridItemId)
          if (!item) {
            return prev
          }

          const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
            if (disk.id !== diskId) {
              return disk
            }
            return {
              ...disk,
              latestResult,
              latestResultId: latestResult.id,
            }
          })

          const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
            ...item,
            disks: updatedDisks,
          }
          next.set(gridItemId, updatedItem)
          return next
        })

        toast({
          title: "Refreshed",
          description: "Disk result has been refreshed with the latest data.",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
      } catch (error: any) {
        console.error("Failed to refresh disk:", error)
        toast({
          title: "Refresh Failed",
          description: error.message || "Failed to refresh disk. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      }
    },
    [toast, gridItems, parseDashboardRequirement]
  )

  const handleRun = useCallback(
    (gridItemId: string) => {
      const gridItem = gridItems.get(gridItemId)
      if (!gridItem || gridItem.disks.length === 0) {
        toast({
          title: "No disk available",
          description: "This grid item does not have a disk to run.",
          status: "warning",
          duration: 2000,
        })
        return
      }
      const disk = gridItem.disks[0]
      setRunModalState({
        isOpen: true,
        gridItemId,
        disk,
      })
    },
    [gridItems, toast]
  )

  const handleRunModalClose = useCallback(() => {
    setRunModalState((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      isOpen: false,
    }))
  }, [])

  const handleRunCompleted = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!runModalState.gridItemId || !runModalState.disk) {
      return
    }
    try {
      const currentDisk = runModalState.disk

      // Handle dashboard type disks - refresh by re-parsing requirement
      if (currentDisk.category === "dashboard") {
        // Fetch latest disk data from database (including updated requirement)
        const updatedDiskData = await AppNodeService.getAppNode(currentDisk.id)

        // Parse requirement to generate dashboardCharts
        const { dashboardCharts, dashboardError } = parseDashboardRequirement(updatedDiskData)

        // Update gridItems with refreshed dashboard data
        let updatedItems: Map<string, GridItemData> | null = null
        setGridItems((prev) => {
          const next = new Map(prev)
          const item = next.get(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "")
          if (!item) {
            return prev
          }

          const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
            if (disk.id !== currentDisk.id) {
              return disk
            }
            return {
              ...disk,
              ...updatedDiskData, // Update with latest disk data
              dashboardCharts,
              dashboardError,
              latestResultId: null, // Dashboard disks don't have execution results
            }
          })

          const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
            ...item,
            disks: updatedDisks,
          }
          next.set(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "", updatedItem)
          updatedItems = next
          return next
        })

        if (updatedItems) {
          await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
        }

        toast({
          title: "图表已刷新",
          description: "Dashboard 图表已更新",
          status: "success",
          duration: 2000,
        })
        return
      }

      // Handle regular disks - refresh latest execution result
      const results = await DiskService.getDiskExecutionResults(currentDisk.id)
      const latestResult = results[0] ?? null
      if (!latestResult) {
        return
      }

      let updatedItems: Map<string, GridItemData> | null = null
      setGridItems((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        const item = next.get(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "")
        if (!item) {
          return prev
        }
        const updatedDisks = item.disks.map((disk) => {
          if (disk.id !== currentDisk.id) {
            return disk
          }
          return {
            ...disk,
            latestResultId: latestResult.id,
            latestResult,
          }
        })
        const updatedItem: GridItemData = {
          ...item,
          disks: updatedDisks,
        }
        next.set(runModalState.gridItemId ?? "", updatedItem)
        updatedItems = next
        return next
      })

      if (updatedItems) {
        await saveGridSpaceData({ items: updatedItems })
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to refresh after run:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Refresh Failed",
        description: "Failed to refresh disk results after running.",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [runModalState.disk, runModalState.gridItemId, saveGridSpaceData, toast, parseDashboardRequirement])

  // Only log in debug mode
  if (import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_RENDER === "true") {
    console.log("🎨 AIGridLayout RETURN - About to render JSX, isEditMode:", isEditMode)
  }

  return (
    <>
      {/* Disk Properties Sidebar */}
      {editingDiskInfo && (
        <>
          <Box
            position="fixed"
            top={0}
            left={0}
            right="400px"
            bottom={0}
            bg="rgba(0,0,0,0.05)"
            zIndex={900}
            onClick={() => {
              setEditingGridId(null)
              setEditingLockId(null)
            }}
          />
          <AIGridDiskSidebar
            diskId={editingDiskInfo.diskId}
            diskName={editingDiskInfo.diskName}
            isOpen={true}
            onClose={() => {
              setEditingGridId(null)
              setEditingLockId(null)
            }}
          />
        </>
      )}
      
      <Box
        ref={combinedRef}
        w="100%"
        minH="100%"
        maxW="100%"
        position="relative"
        border={isOver ? "2px dashed" : "none"}
        borderColor={isOver ? "blue.500" : "transparent"}
        overflow="visible"
        bg="#ffffff"
        sx={{
          // Grid background pattern using pseudo-elements to avoid Chakra UI conflicts
          // This ensures both horizontal and vertical lines are displayed
          position: 'relative',
          // Prevent flex layout from adjusting container size
          flexShrink: 0,
          flexGrow: 0,
          width: '100%',
          maxWidth: '100%',
          minWidth: 0,
          '&::before': {
            content: '""',
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            pointerEvents: 'none',
            zIndex: 0,
            // Horizontal lines (to bottom)
            backgroundImage: 'repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 0, transparent calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb 15px)',
            backgroundSize: '100% 15px',
          },
          '&::after': {
            content: '""',
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            pointerEvents: 'none',
            zIndex: 0,
            // Vertical lines (to right)
            backgroundImage: 'repeating-linear-gradient(to right, transparent 0, transparent calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb calc(15px - 1px), #e5e7eb 15px)',
            backgroundSize: '15px 100%',
          },
        }}
      >

      
      <Box
        ref={(node) => {
          gridLayoutContainerRef.current = node
          // Log when ref is set
          if (node) {
            const nodeRect = node.getBoundingClientRect()
            const parent = node.parentElement
            const parentRect = parent ? parent.getBoundingClientRect() : null
            
            console.log("🔗 [AIGridLayout] gridLayoutContainerRef - SET:", {
              offsetWidth: node.offsetWidth,
              clientWidth: node.clientWidth,
              scrollWidth: node.scrollWidth,
              offsetLeft: node.offsetLeft,
              scrollLeft: node.scrollLeft,
              boundingRect: {
                left: nodeRect.left,
                top: nodeRect.top,
                right: nodeRect.right,
                bottom: nodeRect.bottom,
                width: nodeRect.width,
                height: nodeRect.height,
              },
              parent: parent ? {
                offsetWidth: parent.offsetWidth,
                clientWidth: parent.clientWidth,
                scrollWidth: parent.scrollWidth,
                offsetLeft: parent.offsetLeft,
                scrollLeft: parent.scrollLeft,
                boundingRect: parentRect ? {
                  left: parentRect.left,
                  top: parentRect.top,
                  right: parentRect.right,
                  bottom: parentRect.bottom,
                  width: parentRect.width,
                  height: parentRect.height,
                } : null,
              } : null,
            })
          }
        }}
        w="100%"
        h="100%"
        maxW="100%"
        position="relative"
        zIndex={1}
        sx={{
          // Ensure the container doesn't expand beyond parent
          boxSizing: 'border-box',
          // Prevent horizontal scrolling from causing layout shift
          overflowX: 'hidden',
          overflowY: isEditMode ? 'hidden' : 'auto',
          // Force width to be exactly 100% of parent, no more
          width: '100%',
          maxWidth: '100%',
          minWidth: 0,
          // Allow container to expand beyond viewport height when content is larger
          minHeight: '100%',
        }}
      >
      <ResponsiveGridLayout
        className="layout"
        layouts={processedLayouts}
        breakpoints={{ lg: 1200, md: 996, sm: 768, xs: 480, xxs: 0 }}
        cols={GRID_CONFIG.cols}
        rowHeight={GRID_CONFIG.rowHeight}
        margin={GRID_CONFIG.margin}
        containerPadding={GRID_CONFIG.containerPadding}
        onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
        isDraggable={true}
        isResizable={true}
        resizeHandles={["se", "sw", "ne", "nw", "s", "n", "e", "w"]}
        compactType={null}
        draggableHandle=".grid-drag-handle"
      >
        {currentLayout.map((layoutItem) => {
          const itemData = gridItems.get(layoutItem.i)
          if (!itemData) return null

          // Only log in debug mode
          if (import.meta.env.DEV && import.meta.env.VITE_DEBUG_GRID_RENDER === "true") {
            console.log("📦 Rendering AIGridItem:", {
              itemId: layoutItem.i,
              hasOnTogglePin: !!handleTogglePin,
              isPinned: itemData.isPinned,
              static: layoutItem.static
            })
          }

          return (
            <Box 
              key={layoutItem.i} 
              data-grid={layoutItem} 
              data-key={layoutItem.i}
              data-grid-item={layoutItem.i}
              ref={(node) => {
                if (node) {
                  gridItemRefs.current.set(layoutItem.i, node)
                } else {
                  gridItemRefs.current.delete(layoutItem.i)
                }
              }}
            >
              <AIGridItem 
                data={itemData} 
                onTogglePin={handleTogglePin}
                isEditMode={isEditMode}
                isSelected={selectedGridId === layoutItem.i}
                onSelect={() => handleGridSelect(layoutItem.i)}
                onEdit={() => handleGridEdit(layoutItem.i)}
                onDelete={() => handleGridDelete(layoutItem.i)}
                onRun={() => handleRun(layoutItem.i)}
                onTextEditChange={handleTextEditChange}
                onTextEditCommit={handleTextEditCommit}
                onRefreshDisk={handleRefreshDisk}
              />
            </Box>
          )
        })}
      </ResponsiveGridLayout>
      {runModalState.disk && (
        <AIGridRunModal
          isOpen={runModalState.isOpen}
          disk={runModalState.disk}
          onClose={handleRunModalClose}
          onCompleted={handleRunCompleted}
        />
      )}
      </Box>
    </Box>
    </>
  )
}

```

## 实现总结

### 1. Footer 隐藏功能
- 在 `_layout.tsx` 中添加路径判断
- 当路径为 `/aigrid` 时隐藏 Footer，其他页面保留

### 2. Grid Item 自动高度调整
- 使用 `ResizeObserver` 监听每个 grid item 的内容高度
- 当内容高度超过当前 `h * rowHeight` 时，自动增加 `h` 值
- 计算逻辑：
  - 使用 `scrollHeight` 获取实际内容高度（包括溢出部分）
  - 根据 `rowHeight` 和 `margin` 计算所需行数
  - 添加 20px 的 padding 确保内容完全可见
  - 无最大高度限制
- 编辑模式：在编辑模式下不自动调整，允许手动调整大小
- 更新机制：同时更新所有 breakpoints 的 layout 和 gridItems

### 技术细节
- 使用 `gridItemRefs` 存储每个 grid item 的 DOM 引用
- 通过 `getCurrentBreakpoint()` 获取当前响应式断点
- 自动清理 ResizeObserver，避免内存泄漏

功能已实现并通过 linter 检查。请测试：
1. Footer 在 aigrid 页面是否已隐藏
2. Grid item 是否能够根据内容自动调整高度，完整显示内容

如有问题，请告知。

---

**User**

你没完全理解我需求，如图所示，现在的窘境是：无论如何也看不到完整的红色框中grid的完整的内容(通过grid内部的竖向滚动条拖拉可以看到grid内的所有内容，但这不够)，也就是grid会被页面截断的视觉感受不友好，按理说，这个页面应该继续拉伸，使得grid都能完全展示出来。请理解我的需求，在修改前，请征求我的意见

---

**Cursor**

收到，小黄  
目前页面 `/_layout/aigrid` 的根容器被固定为 `h="100vh"` 并 `overflow="hidden"`。因此 React Grid Layout 区域只能占据一个视口高度：底部的 grid 超出这一高度时，就被父容器裁掉了，只能依赖内部滚动。若想让红框 grid 在页面上继续向下铺展并通过浏览器滚动查看，需要解除外层的高度约束，让 `main` 区域以 `min-height:100vh`、`overflow-y:auto` 或者普通文档流延伸方式渲染。

我准备的调整思路如下，麻烦确认是否同意：  
1. 将 `/_layout/aigrid` 根容器以及 `_layout.tsx` 中的主内容区域从固定 `height:100vh + overflow hidden` 改为 `min-height:100vh` 并允许 `overflow-y:auto`，从而让页面可以纵向继续增长。  
2. 确保 React Grid Layout 容器跟随外层高度自动延伸，不再强行限制在 100%。  
3. 保留已经实现的 grid 自动增高逻辑，这样每个 grid 会自然撑开，整体页面通过浏览器滚动展示。

请确认这个方案是否符合预期，确认后我再动手调整。

---

**User**

符合预期，请开始

---

**Cursor**

```typescriptreact
import {
  Box,
  Button,
  Flex,
  HStack,
  Icon,
  IconButton,
  Menu,
  MenuButton,
  MenuItem,
  MenuList,
  Tooltip,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import {
  Navigate,
  Outlet,
  createFileRoute,
  useRouter,
} from "@tanstack/react-router"

import { useState, useEffect, useLayoutEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react"
import { FiChevronRight, FiLogOut, FiSettings, FiUser } from "react-icons/fi"

import Footer from "@/components/Common/Footer"
import { MenuProvider } from "@/components/Common/MenuContext"
import Sidebar from "@/components/Common/Sidebar"
import UserModeSelector from "@/components/Common/UserModeSelector"
import {
  UserModeProvider,
  useUserMode,
} from "@/components/Common/UserModeContext"
import useAuth, { isLoggedIn } from "@/hooks/useAuth"

// Import responsive layout styles
import "@/styles/responsive-layout.css"
// Import page width fix styles
import "@/styles/width-fix.css"
// Import Admin page spacing optimization styles
import "@/styles/admin-spacing.css"

const autoCollapsePaths = ["/workbench", "/aigrid"]
const isAutoCollapsePath = (path: string) =>
  autoCollapsePaths.some((target) => path.startsWith(target))

export const Route = createFileRoute("/_layout")({
  component: Layout,
})

function LayoutContent() {
  const { currentMode, setCurrentMode } = useUserMode()
  const router = useRouter()
  const { user, logout } = useAuth()
  // 记录进入自动折叠页面前的折叠状态
  const preAutoCollapseRef = useRef<boolean | null>(null)
  // 记录上一个路径，用于判断离开/workbench
  const prevPathRef = useRef<string>(router.state.location.pathname)

  // 初始化：优先根据当前路径（/workbench 收起、/ 展开）设定，否则读取localStorage
  const [isSidebarCollapsed, setIsSidebarCollapsed] = useState<boolean>(() => {
    try {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem("sidebar-collapsed")
      const savedVal = saved ? JSON.parse(saved) === true : false
      const path = router.state.location.pathname
      if (path === "/") {
        return false
      }
      if (isAutoCollapsePath(path)) {
        preAutoCollapseRef.current = savedVal
        return true
      }
      return savedVal
    } catch {
      const path = router.state.location.pathname
      if (path === "/") return false
      if (isAutoCollapsePath(path)) {
        preAutoCollapseRef.current = false
        return true
      }
      return false
    }
  })

  // Check if user is logged in
  if (!isLoggedIn()) {
    console.log("User not logged in, redirecting to login")
    return <Navigate to="/login" />
  }

  // Check if on main page - used to determine if we should show title in header
  const currentPath = router.state.location.pathname
  const isMainPage = currentPath === "/" || currentPath === ""

  // Pages that require Management Mode (should always show sidebar and header)
  const managementModePages = [
    "/policy-library",
    "/admin",
    "/dashboard",
    "/data-ingestor",
    "/graph-explorer",
    "/workbench",
    "/aigrid",
    "/canvas",
    "/playstation",
    "/steer",
    "/risk-management",
    "/internal-control",
  ]

  // Check if current path requires Management Mode
  const requiresManagementMode = managementModePages.some((path) =>
    currentPath.startsWith(path)
  )

  // Auto-switch to Management Mode when accessing Management Mode pages
  useEffect(() => {
    if (requiresManagementMode && currentMode !== "super_admin") {
      console.log("Auto-switching to Management Mode for page:", currentPath)
      setCurrentMode("super_admin")
    }
  }, [requiresManagementMode, currentMode, currentPath, setCurrentMode])

  // Determine whether to show sidebar based on user mode or page requirement
  // Show sidebar if: user is in super_admin mode OR current page requires Management Mode
  const shouldShowSidebar = currentMode === "super_admin" || requiresManagementMode

  // 持久化到 localStorage
  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      localStorage.setItem("sidebar-collapsed", JSON.stringify(isSidebarCollapsed))
    } catch {}
  }, [isSidebarCollapsed])

  // 渲染前：处理进入/离开 workbench 的状态切换（方案C）并强制首页展开
  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    const path = router.state.location.pathname
    const wasPath = prevPathRef.current
    const isAutoPath = isAutoCollapsePath(path)
    const wasAutoPath = isAutoCollapsePath(wasPath)

    // 首页始终展开
    if (path === "/" && isSidebarCollapsed) {
      setIsSidebarCollapsed(false)
      prevPathRef.current = path
      return
    }

    // 进入自动折叠页面
    if (!wasAutoPath && isAutoPath) {
      preAutoCollapseRef.current = isSidebarCollapsed
      if (!isSidebarCollapsed) setIsSidebarCollapsed(true)
    }

    // 离开自动折叠页面
    if (wasAutoPath && !isAutoPath) {
      if (preAutoCollapseRef.current !== null) {
        setIsSidebarCollapsed(preAutoCollapseRef.current)
      }
    }

    prevPathRef.current = path
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [router.state.location.pathname])

  // 侧边栏切换（用户手动）
  const handleToggleSidebar = () => {
    setIsSidebarCollapsed(!isSidebarCollapsed)
  }

  const handleLogout = useCallback(() => {
    logout()
  }, [logout])

  return (
    <MenuProvider>
      <Flex
        direction="column"
        minH="100vh"
        w="100vw"
        maxW="100vw"
        overflowX="hidden"
      >
        <Flex flex="1" bg="#f8f9fa" w="100%" maxW="100%">
          {/* Left Sidebar - Displayed in Management mode */}
          {shouldShowSidebar && (
            <Sidebar
              isCollapsed={isSidebarCollapsed}
              onToggleCollapse={handleToggleSidebar}
            />
          )}

          {/* Right Content Area */}
          <Box
            flex="1"
            bg="#ffffff"
            overflowY="visible"
            overflowX="hidden"
            position="relative"
            ml={shouldShowSidebar && !isSidebarCollapsed ? "280px" : "0"}
            transition="margin-left 0.3s ease"
            minWidth="0"
            w="100%"
            maxW="100%"
            className={`main-content ${shouldShowSidebar && !isSidebarCollapsed ? "sidebar-expanded" : ""}`}
          >
            {/* 顶部条只在非首页显示（沿用原逻辑） */}
            {shouldShowSidebar && !isMainPage && (
              <Box
                bg="white"
                borderBottom="1px solid"
                borderColor="gray.200"
                px={6}
                py={3}
                position="sticky"
                top={0}
                zIndex={10}
                w="100%"
                maxW="100%"
              >
                <Flex justify="space-between" align="center">
                  {/* 展开按钮 - 只在收缩时显示 */}
                  {isSidebarCollapsed && (
                    <Tooltip label="展开导航栏" placement="bottom">
                      <IconButton
                        aria-label="展开侧边栏"
                        icon={<Icon as={FiChevronRight} />}
                        size="md"
                        variant="ghost"
                        onClick={handleToggleSidebar}
                        color="gray.600"
                        _hover={{ color: "#9e1422" }}
                      />
                    </Tooltip>
                  )}
                  <Box />
                  <HStack spacing={4}>
                    <UserModeSelector
                      currentMode={currentMode}
                      onModeChange={setCurrentMode}
                    />
                    <Menu>
                      <MenuButton
                        as={Button}
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="sm"
                        leftIcon={<FiUser />}
                        rightIcon={<Icon as={FiSettings} />}
                      >
                        {user?.full_name || user?.email}
                      </MenuButton>
                      <MenuList>
                        <MenuItem icon={<FiLogOut />} onClick={handleLogout}>
                          Logout
                        </MenuItem>
                      </MenuList>
                    </Menu>
                  </HStack>
                </Flex>
              </Box>
            )}

            <Box
              position="absolute"
              top={0}
              left={0}
              right={0}
              height="100px"
              bg="linear-gradient(180deg, #f8f9fa 0%, #ffffff 100%)"
              zIndex="-1"
            />
            <Box
              pt="0px"
              px="0"
              pb="40px"
              minH="calc(100vh - 80px)"
              w="100%"
              maxW="100%"
              overflowX="hidden"
            >
              <Outlet />
            </Box>
          </Box>
        </Flex>
        {/* Hide Footer on aigrid page to maximize grid space */}
        {!currentPath.startsWith("/aigrid") && <Footer />}
      </Flex>
    </MenuProvider>
  )
}

function Layout() {
  console.log("Layout component rendered")

  return (
    <UserModeProvider>
      <LayoutContent />
    </UserModeProvider>
  )
}

export default Layout

```

```typescriptreact
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from "react"
import { createFileRoute, useRouter } from "@tanstack/react-router"
import { Box, useToast, useDisclosure, IconButton, Tooltip } from "@chakra-ui/react"
import {
  AlertDialog,
  AlertDialogBody,
  AlertDialogFooter,
  AlertDialogHeader,
  AlertDialogContent,
  AlertDialogOverlay,
  Button,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiEdit3 } from "react-icons/fi"
import { DndProvider } from "react-dnd"
import { HTML5Backend } from "react-dnd-html5-backend"
import AIGridSidebar from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridSidebar"
import { AIGridLayout } from "@/components/AIGrid/AIGridLayout"
import { GridSpaceService, type GridSpace } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"

export const Route = createFileRoute("/_layout/aigrid")({
  component: AIGrid,
})

function AIGrid() {
  const toast = useToast()
  const router = useRouter()
  const [currentGridSpaceId, setCurrentGridSpaceId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [gridSpaces, setGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [unsavedSpaces, setUnsavedSpaces] = useState<Map<string, boolean>>(new Map())
  const [saveFunction, setSaveFunction] = useState<(() => Promise<void>) | null>(null)
  const [pendingNavigation, setPendingNavigation] = useState<(() => void) | null>(null)
  const [isEditMode, setIsEditMode] = useState(false) // 编辑模式状态
  const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure()
  const cancelRef = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null)

  // Toggle edit mode
  const handleToggleEditMode = useCallback(() => {
    console.log("🖊️ Parent: Toggle edit mode called, current isEditMode:", isEditMode)
    setIsEditMode((prev) => {
      const newMode = !prev
      console.log("🖊️ Parent: Edit mode changed to:", newMode)
      return newMode
    })
  }, [isEditMode])

  // Debug: Log when component renders
  useEffect(() => {
    console.log("🎨 AIGrid (Parent) rendered:", {
      isEditMode,
      currentGridSpaceId,
      hasSaveFunction: !!saveFunction,
    })
  }, [isEditMode, currentGridSpaceId, saveFunction])

  // Load grid spaces on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [])

  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setGridSpaces(spaces)

      // Auto-select first space if available and no current space selected
      if (spaces.length > 0 && !currentGridSpaceId) {
        setCurrentGridSpaceId(spaces[0].id)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  // Create new Grid Space
  const handleCreateGridSpace = useCallback(async (): Promise<string | null> => {
    try {
      const defaultName = GridSpaceService.generateDefaultGridSpaceName(gridSpaces)
      const newSpace = await GridSpaceService.createGridSpace({
        name: defaultName,
      })
      
      // Refresh grid spaces list
      await loadGridSpaces()
      
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Created",
        description: `Created "${newSpace.name}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
      })
      
      return newSpace.id
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to create grid space:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to create grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
      return null
    }
  }, [gridSpaces, loadGridSpaces, toast])

  // Handle when Grid Space is created (e.g., from drop)
  const handleGridSpaceCreated = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleGridSpaceSelect = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string) => {
    setCurrentGridSpaceId(gridSpaceId)
  }, [])

  const handleLayoutChange = useCallback(
    async (_layouts: any) => {
      // Layout change is handled by AIGridLayout, no auto-save here
    },
    []
  )

  // Handle unsaved changes notification from AIGridLayout
  const handleUnsavedChange = useCallback((gridSpaceId: string, hasUnsavedChanges: boolean) => {
    setUnsavedSpaces((prev) => {
      const next = new Map(prev)
      if (hasUnsavedChanges) {
        next.set(gridSpaceId, true)
      } else {
        next.delete(gridSpaceId)
      }
      return next
    })
  }, [])

  // Register save function from AIGridLayout
  const handleSaveRequest = useCallback((saveFn: () => Promise<void>) => {
    setSaveFunction(() => saveFn)
  }, [])

  // Handle save button click from sidebar
  const handleSaveGridSpace = useCallback(async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    if (gridSpaceId === currentGridSpaceId && saveFunction) {
      await saveFunction()
      // Clear unsaved state after successful save
      setUnsavedSpaces((prev) => {
        const next = new Map(prev)
        next.delete(gridSpaceId)
        return next
      })
    } else {
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Cannot save: space is not currently active",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, saveFunction, toast])

  // Check if there are any unsaved changes
  const hasAnyUnsavedChanges = useCallback(() => {
    return unsavedSpaces.size > 0
  }, [unsavedSpaces])

  // Handle page unload (browser close/refresh)
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleBeforeUnload = (e: BeforeUnloadEvent) => {
      // Skip in development mode to avoid interfering with HMR
      if (import.meta.env.DEV) {
        return
      }
      
      // Only show dialog if there are real unsaved changes
      if (hasAnyUnsavedChanges()) {
        e.preventDefault()
        e.returnValue = "" // Chrome requires returnValue to be set
        return "" // Some browsers require return value
      }
    }

    window.addEventListener("beforeunload", handleBeforeUnload)
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener("beforeunload", handleBeforeUnload)
    }
  }, [hasAnyUnsavedChanges])

  // Handle navigation away (internal routing)
  // Intercept link clicks and navigation
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleLinkClick = (e: MouseEvent) => {
      const target = e.target as HTMLElement
      const link = target.closest('a[href]') as HTMLAnchorElement | null
      
      if (link && hasAnyUnsavedChanges()) {
        // Check if it's an internal link
        const href = link.getAttribute('href')
        if (href && (href.startsWith('/') || href.startsWith('#'))) {
          e.preventDefault()
          setPendingNavigation(() => () => {
            router.navigate({ to: href as any })
          })
          onOpen()
        }
      }
    }

    // Intercept browser back/forward
    const handlePopState = (e: PopStateEvent) => {
      if (hasAnyUnsavedChanges()) {
        e.preventDefault()
        window.history.pushState(null, '', window.location.href)
        onOpen()
      }
    }

    document.addEventListener('click', handleLinkClick, true)
    window.addEventListener('popstate', handlePopState)

    return () => {
      document.removeEventListener('click', handleLinkClick, true)
      window.removeEventListener('popstate', handlePopState)
    }
  }, [router, hasAnyUnsavedChanges, onOpen])

  // Handle confirmation dialog
  const handleConfirmLeave = useCallback(() => {
    onClose()
    if (pendingNavigation) {
      pendingNavigation()
      setPendingNavigation(null)
    }
  }, [pendingNavigation, onClose])

  const handleCancelLeave = useCallback(() => {
    onClose()
    setPendingNavigation(null)
  }, [onClose])

  const handleSaveAndLeave = useCallback(async () => {
    if (currentGridSpaceId && saveFunction) {
      try {
        await saveFunction()
        setUnsavedSpaces((prev) => {
          const next = new Map(prev)
          next.delete(currentGridSpaceId)
          return next
        })
        onClose()
        if (pendingNavigation) {
          pendingNavigation()
          setPendingNavigation(null)
        }
      } catch (error) {
        toast({
          title: "Save Failed",
          description: "Failed to save changes. Please try again.",
          status: "error",
          duration: 3000,
        })
      }
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, saveFunction, pendingNavigation, onClose, toast])

  // Diagnostic: Track root container dimensions
  const rootContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
  const mainContentRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const logDimensions = () => {
      if (rootContainerRef.current && mainContentRef.current) {
        const root = rootContainerRef.current
        const main = mainContentRef.current
        const rootRect = root.getBoundingClientRect()
        const mainRect = main.getBoundingClientRect()
        
        console.log("📐 [AIGrid] Root Container Dimensions:", {
          root: {
            offsetWidth: root.offsetWidth,
            clientWidth: root.clientWidth,
            scrollWidth: root.scrollWidth,
            offsetLeft: root.offsetLeft,
            scrollLeft: root.scrollLeft,
            boundingRect: {
              left: rootRect.left,
              top: rootRect.top,
              right: rootRect.right,
              bottom: rootRect.bottom,
              width: rootRect.width,
              height: rootRect.height,
            },
          },
          mainContent: {
            offsetWidth: main.offsetWidth,
            clientWidth: main.clientWidth,
            scrollWidth: main.scrollWidth,
            offsetLeft: main.offsetLeft,
            scrollLeft: main.scrollLeft,
            boundingRect: {
              left: mainRect.left,
              top: mainRect.top,
              right: mainRect.right,
              bottom: mainRect.bottom,
              width: mainRect.width,
              height: mainRect.height,
            },
          },
          document: {
            scrollLeft: document.documentElement.scrollLeft,
            scrollTop: document.documentElement.scrollTop,
            bodyScrollLeft: document.body.scrollLeft,
            bodyScrollTop: document.body.scrollTop,
          },
          window: {
            innerWidth: window.innerWidth,
            outerWidth: window.outerWidth,
            documentWidth: document.documentElement.clientWidth,
            scrollX: window.scrollX,
            scrollY: window.scrollY,
          },
          sidebar: (() => {
            const sidebar = document.querySelector('[data-sidebar="aigrid"]') as HTMLElement
            if (sidebar) {
              const sidebarRect = sidebar.getBoundingClientRect()
              return {
                offsetWidth: sidebar.offsetWidth,
                clientWidth: sidebar.clientWidth,
                scrollWidth: sidebar.scrollWidth,
                offsetLeft: sidebar.offsetLeft,
                scrollLeft: sidebar.scrollLeft,
                boundingRect: {
                  left: sidebarRect.left,
                  top: sidebarRect.top,
                  right: sidebarRect.right,
                  bottom: sidebarRect.bottom,
                  width: sidebarRect.width,
                  height: sidebarRect.height,
                },
              }
            }
            return null
          })(),
        })
      }
    }

    // Log on mount and when grid space changes
    logDimensions()
    const interval = setInterval(logDimensions, 1000) // Log every second for debugging

    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [currentGridSpaceId])

  return (
    <DndProvider backend={HTML5Backend}>
      <Box 
        ref={rootContainerRef}
        data-root="aigrid"
        w="100%" 
        minH="100vh" 
        maxW="100vw" 
        display="flex" 
        overflowX="hidden" 
        overflowY="visible"
        position="relative"
      >
        {/* Left Sidebar */}
        <AIGridSidebar
          onGridSpaceSelect={handleGridSpaceSelect}
          currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
          onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
          onSaveGridSpace={handleSaveGridSpace}
          unsavedSpaces={unsavedSpaces}
        />

        {/* Main Grid Layout Area */}
        <Box 
          ref={mainContentRef}
          flex="1" 
          minW={0} 
          maxW="100%" 
          display="flex" 
          flexDirection="column" 
          overflowX="hidden"
          overflowY="visible"
          position="relative"
        >
          {/* Edit Mode Toggle Button - Fixed position in viewport (considering sidebar width ~220px) */}
          {(() => {
            console.log("🖊️ Rendering Edit Mode Toggle Button:", {
              isEditMode,
              hasOnClick: !!handleToggleEditMode,
            })
            return (
              <Tooltip label={isEditMode ? "Exit Edit Mode" : "Enter Edit Mode"} placement="left">
                <IconButton
                  aria-label={isEditMode ? "Exit Edit Mode" : "Enter Edit Mode"}
                  icon={<FiEdit3 />}
                  size="sm"
                  colorScheme={isEditMode ? "blue" : "gray"}
                  variant={isEditMode ? "solid" : "ghost"}
                  position="fixed"
                  top={4}
                  right={4}
                  zIndex={2000}
                  onClick={() => {
                    console.log("🖊️ Edit button clicked!")
                    handleToggleEditMode()
                  }}
                  boxShadow="md"
                  _hover={{ transform: "scale(1.1)" }}
                  transition="all 0.2s"
                  bg={isEditMode ? "blue.500" : "gray.200"}
                  color={isEditMode ? "white" : "gray.700"}
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )
          })()}

          <AIGridLayout
            currentGridSpaceId={currentGridSpaceId}
            onLayoutChange={handleLayoutChange}
            onCreateGridSpace={handleCreateGridSpace}
            onGridSpaceCreated={handleGridSpaceCreated}
            onUnsavedChange={handleUnsavedChange}
            onSaveRequest={handleSaveRequest}
            isEditMode={isEditMode}
            onEditModeToggle={handleToggleEditMode}
          />
          {!currentGridSpaceId && (
            <Box
              position="absolute"
              top={0}
              left={0}
              right={0}
              bottom={0}
              display="flex"
              alignItems="center"
              justifyContent="center"
              bg="rgba(249, 250, 251, 0.95)"
              zIndex={10}
              pointerEvents="none"
            >
              <Box textAlign="center" pointerEvents="auto">
                <Box fontSize="xl" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.500" mb={2}>
                  No Grid Space Selected
                </Box>
                <Box fontSize="sm" color="gray.400" mb={4}>
                  Select or create a grid space to start, or drag an application to create one automatically
                </Box>
              </Box>
            </Box>
          )}
        </Box>
      </Box>

      {/* Unsaved Changes Confirmation Dialog */}
      <AlertDialog
        isOpen={isOpen}
        leastDestructiveRef={cancelRef}
        onClose={handleCancelLeave}
        isCentered
      >
        <AlertDialogOverlay>
          <AlertDialogContent>
            <AlertDialogHeader fontSize="lg" fontWeight="bold">
              Unsaved Changes
            </AlertDialogHeader>

            <AlertDialogBody>
              You have unsaved changes. Do you want to save them before leaving?
            </AlertDialogBody>

            <AlertDialogFooter>
              <Button ref={cancelRef} onClick={handleCancelLeave}>
                Cancel
              </Button>
              <Button colorScheme="red" onClick={handleConfirmLeave} ml={3}>
                Leave Without Saving
              </Button>
              {currentGridSpaceId && saveFunction && (
                <Button colorScheme="blue" onClick={handleSaveAndLeave} ml={3}>
                  Save and Leave
                </Button>
              )}
            </AlertDialogFooter>
          </AlertDialogContent>
        </AlertDialogOverlay>
      </AlertDialog>
    </DndProvider>
  )
}


```

收到，小黄  
- 调整 `/_layout.tsx` 主内容容器，改为 `overflowY="visible"`（仍保持 `overflowX="hidden"`），解除视口高度限制，让页面可继续向下延展并使用浏览器滚动。  
- 更新 `/_layout/aigrid.tsx`：根容器改为 `minH="100vh"` 且仅限制横向溢出，主体区域同样改为 `overflowY="visible"`。这样整个 AIGrid 区域随内容增长，不再被外层裁剪，只需滚动页面即可看到完整 grid。  

建议刷新页面（必要时清缓存）验证：底部 grid 是否随页面滚动完全展示，同时内部滚动依旧可用。若仍需调优布局，可继续反馈。

---

**User**

很好，你已经解决了grid被页面割裂的视觉不友好的问题，很棒。现在有个小小的优化点，如图所示，这个左栏SPACES区域和MY AGENTS区域离的太近，导致左栏下方空很大，视觉效果不好，我需要SPACES区域和MY AGENTS区域两个区域之间有点距离，大概类似图二这种，请理解我的需求，在修改前，请征求我的意见，请开始

---

**Cursor**

收到，小黄  
当前左侧栏里 `SPACES` 与 `MY AGENTS` 两个区块几乎贴在一起，下方却出现大片空白。我的理解是：需要在这两个区块之间增加一个竖向间距（类似第二张图的效果），以便视觉层级更清晰。不过整体布局结构和功能不需要改变，只是局部 padding/margin 的微调。  
我计划调整 `AIGridSidebar` 中对应 Section 容器的 `mt`/`mb` 或增加一个 divider，让 `SPACES` 列表与 `MY AGENTS` 列表之间留出大约 16–24px 的间距。这样不会影响滚动和交互。  
请确认这种方式是否符合预期，确认后我来修改。

---

**User**

符合预期，请开始

---

**Cursor**

```typescriptreact
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback, useRef } from "react"
import {
  Box,
  VStack,
  HStack,
  Text,
  Input,
  InputGroup,
  InputLeftElement,
  Card,
  CardBody,
  SimpleGrid,
  Badge,
  IconButton,
  Tooltip,
  Divider,
  useToast,
  Modal,
  ModalOverlay,
  ModalContent,
  ModalHeader,
  ModalBody,
  ModalFooter,
  ModalCloseButton,
  useDisclosure,
  Button,
} from "@chakra-ui/react"
import { FiSearch, FiGrid, FiUsers, FiEdit3, FiTrash2, FiPlus, FiSave } from "react-icons/fi"
import { useDrag } from "react-dnd"
import ApplicationMarketplace from "@/components/ApplicationMarketplace/ApplicationMarketplace"
import { GridSpaceService, type GridSpace } from "@/services/gridSpaceService"
import type { AppNode } from "@/types/appNode"

// GridSpace Card Component for SPACES section
interface GridSpaceCardProps {
  gridSpace: {
    id: string
    name: string
    description?: string
    createdAt: string
    isTemporary?: boolean
  }
  onClick: (id: string) => void
  onRename?: (id: string, newName: string) => void
  onDelete?: (id: string) => void
  onSave?: (id: string) => Promise<void>
  isCurrent?: boolean
  hasUnsavedChanges?: boolean
}

const GridSpaceCard = React.memo(function GridSpaceCard({
  gridSpace,
  onClick,
  onRename,
  onDelete,
  onSave,
  isCurrent = false,
  hasUnsavedChanges = false,
}: GridSpaceCardProps) {
  const { isOpen, onOpen, onClose } = useDisclosure()
  const { isOpen: isDeleteOpen, onOpen: onDeleteOpen, onClose: onDeleteClose } = useDisclosure()
  const [newName, setNewName] = useState(gridSpace.name)
  const [isRenaming, setIsRenaming] = useState(false)
  const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(false)
  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
  const toast = useToast()

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    const date = new Date(dateString)
    return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {
      month: "short",
      day: "numeric",
      hour: "2-digit",
      minute: "2-digit",
    })
  }

  const handleRename = async () => {
    if (!onRename || newName.trim() === "" || newName === gridSpace.name) {
      onClose()
      return
    }

    try {
      setIsRenaming(true)
      await onRename(gridSpace.id, newName.trim())
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Renamed",
        description: `Grid Space renamed to "${newName.trim()}"`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      onClose()
    } catch (error) {
      toast({
        title: "Rename Failed",
        description: "Failed to rename grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
    } finally {
      setIsRenaming(false)
    }
  }

  const handleKeyPress = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter") {
      handleRename()
    } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
      setNewName(gridSpace.name)
      onClose()
    }
  }

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!onDelete) return

    try {
      setIsDeleting(true)
      await onDelete(gridSpace.id)
      toast({
        title: "Grid Space Deleted",
        description: `Grid Space "${gridSpace.name}" has been deleted`,
        status: "success",
        duration: 2000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      onDeleteClose()
    } catch (error) {
      toast({
        title: "Delete Failed",
        description: "Failed to delete grid space",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
        isClosable: true,
      })
      setIsDeleting(false)
    }
  }

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!onSave) return

    try {
      setIsSaving(true)
      await onSave(gridSpace.id)
    } catch (error) {
      // Error toast is handled by the save function
    } finally {
      setIsSaving(false)
    }
  }

  return (
    <>
      <Card
        size="sm"
        cursor="pointer"
        _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-2px)", shadow: "md" }}
        transition="all 0.2s"
        w="100%"
        position="relative"
        role="group"
        bg={isCurrent ? "gray.50" : "white"}
        borderLeft={isCurrent ? "3px solid" : "none"}
        borderLeftColor={isCurrent ? "green.500" : "transparent"}
        borderRadius="md"
      >
        <CardBody p={1}>
          <VStack spacing={0.5} align="stretch">
            {/* First row: Name + Action buttons */}
            <HStack justify="space-between" align="center" gap={2} w="100%">
              <HStack spacing={2} flex="1" minW={0} align="center">
                <Tooltip label={gridSpace.name} placement="top" isDisabled={gridSpace.name.length <= 15}>
                  <Text
                    fontSize="sm"
                    fontWeight="semibold"
                    color="gray.800"
                    noOfLines={1}
                    lineHeight="1.3"
                    cursor="pointer"
                    onClick={() => onClick(gridSpace.id)}
                    flex="1"
                    minW={0}
                  >
                    {gridSpace.name}
                  </Text>
                </Tooltip>
              </HStack>

              {/* Action buttons - show on hover */}
              <HStack spacing={1} opacity={0} _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }} transition="opacity 0.2s" flexShrink={0} ml="auto">
                {onSave && isCurrent && (
                  <Tooltip label={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "Save Changes" : "Save"} placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Save Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiSave />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "solid" : "ghost"}
                      colorScheme={hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "blue" : "gray"}
                      _hover={{ bg: hasUnsavedChanges || gridSpace.isTemporary ? "blue.600" : "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        handleSave()
                      }}
                      isLoading={isSaving}
                      isDisabled={!hasUnsavedChanges && !gridSpace.isTemporary}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onRename && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Rename Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Rename Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiEdit3 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      _hover={{ bg: "gray.100" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                        onOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}

                {onDelete && !gridSpace.isTemporary && (
                  <Tooltip label="Delete Grid Space" placement="top">
                    <IconButton
                      aria-label="Delete Grid Space"
                      icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                      size="xs"
                      variant="ghost"
                      colorScheme="red"
                      _hover={{ bg: "red.50" }}
                      onClick={(e) => {
                        e.stopPropagation()
                        onDeleteOpen()
                      }}
                    />
                  </Tooltip>
                )}
              </HStack>
            </HStack>

            {/* Second row: Timestamp + Status indicators - compact single line, right-aligned */}
            <HStack 
              spacing={2} 
              align="center" 
              fontSize="9px" 
              color="gray.500"
              flexWrap="nowrap"
              justify="flex-end"
              w="100%"
            >
              <Text fontSize="9px" color="gray.500" flexShrink={0}>
                {formatDate(gridSpace.createdAt)}
              </Text>
              {isCurrent && (
                <Badge 
                  size="sm" 
                  colorScheme="green" 
                  variant="subtle" 
                  fontSize="9px"
                  fontWeight="medium"
                  px={1}
                  py={0}
                  flexShrink={0}
                >
                  CURRENT
                </Badge>
              )}
              {isCurrent && (gridSpace.isTemporary || hasUnsavedChanges) && (
                <HStack spacing={1} align="center" flexShrink={0}>
                  <Text fontSize="8px" color="gray.500">
                    UNSAVED
                  </Text>
                  <Box
                    w="6px"
                    h="6px"
                    borderRadius="full"
                    bg="orange.500"
                    flexShrink={0}
                    title="Unsaved Changes"
                    boxShadow="0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)"
                  />
                </HStack>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </VStack>
        </CardBody>
      </Card>

      <Modal isOpen={isOpen} onClose={onClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Rename Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Input
              value={newName}
              onChange={(e) => setNewName(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={handleKeyPress}
              placeholder="Enter grid space name"
              autoFocus
            />
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalFooter>
            <HStack
              w="100%"
              justify="flex-end"
              spacing={3}
              flexWrap="wrap"
            >
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                onClick={() => {
                  setNewName(gridSpace.name)
                  onClose()
                }}
              >
                Cancel
              </Button>
              <Button
                colorScheme="blue"
                onClick={handleRename}
                isLoading={isRenaming}
                loadingText="Renaming..."
                isDisabled={newName.trim() === "" || newName === gridSpace.name}
              >
                Save
              </Button>
            </HStack>
          </ModalFooter>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>

      <Modal isOpen={isDeleteOpen} onClose={onDeleteClose} isCentered>
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent>
          <ModalHeader>Delete Grid Space</ModalHeader>
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody>
            <Text>
              Are you sure you want to delete "{gridSpace.name}"? This action cannot be undone.
            </Text>
          </ModalBody>
          <ModalFooter>
            <HStack
              w="100%"
              justify="flex-end"
              spacing={3}
              flexWrap="wrap"
            >
              <Button variant="ghost" onClick={onDeleteClose}>
                Cancel
              </Button>
              <Button colorScheme="red" onClick={handleDelete} isLoading={isDeleting} loadingText="Deleting...">
                Delete
              </Button>
            </HStack>
          </ModalFooter>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </>
  )
})

// Application Card Component for AGENTS section
interface ApplicationCardProps {
  application: AppNode
  onUnpin?: (applicationId: number) => void
  showUnpinButton?: boolean
}

const ApplicationCard = React.memo(function ApplicationCard({
  application,
  onUnpin,
  showUnpinButton = false,
}: ApplicationCardProps) {
  const dragItem = React.useMemo(() => ({ application }), [application.id])

  const [{ isDragging }, drag] = useDrag(
    () => ({
      type: "application",
      item: dragItem,
      collect: (monitor) => ({
        isDragging: monitor.isDragging(),
      }),
    }),
    [dragItem]
  )

  return (
    <Card
      ref={drag}
      size="sm"
      cursor="grab"
      opacity={isDragging ? 0.5 : 1}
      _hover={{ transform: "translateY(-2px)", shadow: "md" }}
      transition="all 0.2s"
      _active={{ cursor: "grabbing" }}
      position="relative"
      role="group"
    >
      <CardBody p={1}>
        <VStack align="start" spacing={0.5} w="100%">
          {/* First row: Name + Unpin button */}
          <HStack justify="flex-start" align="center" gap={2} w="100%">
            <Tooltip label={application.name} placement="top" isDisabled={application.name.length <= 20}>
              <Text
                fontSize="sm"
                fontWeight="medium"
                noOfLines={1}
                flex="1"
                minW={0}
                maxW="calc(100% - 32px)" // Reserve space for unpin button
                cursor="grab"
              >
                {application.name}
              </Text>
            </Tooltip>
            {application.status === "draft" && (
              <Badge colorScheme="yellow" variant="solid" fontSize="0.6rem" borderRadius="full">
                Draft
              </Badge>
            )}
            {showUnpinButton && onUnpin && (
              <Tooltip label="Unpin" placement="top">
                <IconButton
                  aria-label="Unpin Application"
                  icon={<FiTrash2 />}
                  size="xs"
                  variant="ghost"
                  colorScheme="red"
                  opacity={0}
                  _groupHover={{ opacity: 1 }}
                  transition="opacity 0.2s"
                  flexShrink={0}
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation()
                    onUnpin(application.id)
                  }}
                />
              </Tooltip>
            )}
          </HStack>
          {/* Second row: Category and Area badges */}
          {(application.category || application.area) && (
            <HStack spacing={2} w="100%" flexWrap="wrap">
              {application.category && (
                <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="blue" variant="subtle" fontSize="xs">
                  {application.category}
                </Badge>
              )}
              {application.area && (
                <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="green" variant="subtle" fontSize="xs">
                  {application.area}
                </Badge>
              )}
            </HStack>
          )}
        </VStack>
      </CardBody>
    </Card>
  )
})

interface AIGridSidebarProps {
  onGridSpaceSelect: (gridSpaceId: string) => void
  currentGridSpaceId: string | null
  onCreateGridSpace?: () => Promise<string | null> // 返回新创建的 gridSpaceId
  onSaveGridSpace?: (gridSpaceId: string) => Promise<void> // 保存 Grid Space
  unsavedSpaces?: Map<string, boolean> // 未保存的 space ID 映射
  w?: string
}

function AIGridSidebar({ 
  onGridSpaceSelect, 
  currentGridSpaceId, 
  onCreateGridSpace, 
  onSaveGridSpace,
  unsavedSpaces = new Map(),
  w = "220px" 
}: AIGridSidebarProps) {
  const toast = useToast()
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("")
  const [isSearchFocused, setIsSearchFocused] = useState(false)
  const [isMarketplaceOpen, setIsMarketplaceOpen] = useState(false)
  const [pinnedApps, setPinnedApps] = useState<AppNode[]>([])
  const [dropdownHighlight, setDropdownHighlight] = useState(true)
  const [savedGridSpaces, setSavedGridSpaces] = useState<GridSpace[]>([])
  const [currentGridSpace, setCurrentGridSpace] = useState<GridSpace | null>(null)

  // Load grid spaces
  const loadGridSpaces = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const spaces = await GridSpaceService.getUserGridSpaces()
      setSavedGridSpaces(spaces)
      
      if (currentGridSpaceId) {
        const space = spaces.find((s) => s.id === currentGridSpaceId)
        setCurrentGridSpace(space || null)
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to load grid spaces:", error)
      toast({
        title: "Error",
        description: "Failed to load grid spaces",
        status: "error",
        duration: 3000,
      })
    }
  }, [currentGridSpaceId, toast])

  useEffect(() => {
    loadGridSpaces()
  }, [loadGridSpaces])

  // Load pinned applications
  useEffect(() => {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps")
      if (stored) {
        setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(stored))
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error("Failed to parse pinned_apps from localStorage", e)
    }
  }, [])

  const handleAppPin = (app: AppNode) => {
    const isAlreadyPinned = pinnedApps.some((p) => p.id === app.id)
    if (isAlreadyPinned) return
    const next = [...pinnedApps, app]
    setPinnedApps(next)
    localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(next))
    toast({
      title: "Application Pinned",
      description: `${app.name} added to menu`,
      status: "success",
      duration: 2000,
      isClosable: true,
    })
  }

  const handleGridSpaceRename = async (gridSpaceId: string, newName: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.updateGridSpace(gridSpaceId, { name: newName })
      await loadGridSpaces()
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to rename grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const handleGridSpaceDelete = async (gridSpaceId: string) => {
    try {
      await GridSpaceService.deleteGridSpace(gridSpaceId)
      await loadGridSpaces()
      if (currentGridSpaceId === gridSpaceId) {
        onGridSpaceSelect("")
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Failed to delete grid space:", error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  const filteredGridSpaces = useMemo(() => {
    const allSpaces: GridSpace[] = []
    
    if (currentGridSpace) {
      allSpaces.push(currentGridSpace)
    }
    
    const otherSpaces = savedGridSpaces.filter(
      (space) => !currentGridSpace || space.id !== currentGridSpace.id
    )
    allSpaces.push(...otherSpaces)
    
    return allSpaces.filter(
      (space) =>
        space.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        (space.description &&
          space.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
    )
  }, [savedGridSpaces, currentGridSpace, searchQuery])

  const filteredApplications = useMemo(
    () =>
      pinnedApps.filter(
        (app) =>
          app.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
          (app.description &&
            app.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
      ),
    [pinnedApps, searchQuery]
  )

  const sidebarRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (sidebarRef.current) {
      const sidebar = sidebarRef.current
      const sidebarRect = sidebar.getBoundingClientRect()
      const parent = sidebar.parentElement
      const parentRect = parent ? parent.getBoundingClientRect() : null
      
      console.log("📊 [AIGridSidebar] Sidebar Dimensions:", {
        configuredWidth: w,
        actual: {
          offsetWidth: sidebar.offsetWidth,
          clientWidth: sidebar.clientWidth,
          scrollWidth: sidebar.scrollWidth,
          offsetLeft: sidebar.offsetLeft,
          scrollLeft: sidebar.scrollLeft,
          boundingRect: {
            left: sidebarRect.left,
            top: sidebarRect.top,
            right: sidebarRect.right,
            bottom: sidebarRect.bottom,
            width: sidebarRect.width,
            height: sidebarRect.height,
          },
        },
        parent: parent ? {
          offsetWidth: parent.offsetWidth,
          clientWidth: parent.clientWidth,
          scrollWidth: parent.scrollWidth,
          offsetLeft: parent.offsetLeft,
          scrollLeft: parent.scrollLeft,
          boundingRect: parentRect ? {
            left: parentRect.left,
            top: parentRect.top,
            right: parentRect.right,
            bottom: parentRect.bottom,
            width: parentRect.width,
            height: parentRect.height,
          } : null,
        } : null,
        document: {
          scrollLeft: document.documentElement.scrollLeft,
          scrollTop: document.documentElement.scrollTop,
          bodyScrollLeft: document.body.scrollLeft,
          bodyScrollTop: document.body.scrollTop,
        },
        window: {
          innerWidth: window.innerWidth,
          outerWidth: window.outerWidth,
          documentWidth: document.documentElement.clientWidth,
          scrollX: window.scrollX,
          scrollY: window.scrollY,
        },
      })
    }
  }, [w])

  return (
    <Box
      ref={sidebarRef}
      data-sidebar="aigrid"
      overflow="hidden"
      position="relative"
      w={w}
      minW={w}
      maxW={w}
      h="100%"
      bg="white"
      borderRight="1px solid"
      borderColor="gray.200"
      display="flex"
      flexDirection="column"
      flexShrink={0}
    >
      {/* Search Section */}
      <Box p={4} borderBottom="1px solid" borderColor="gray.100" position="relative">
        <InputGroup size="sm">
          <InputLeftElement pointerEvents="none">
            <FiSearch color="gray.400" />
          </InputLeftElement>
          <Input
            placeholder="Search Space/Agents/Cards"
            value={searchQuery}
            onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
            onFocus={() => setIsSearchFocused(true)}
            onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setIsSearchFocused(false), 150)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (searchQuery.trim() === "" && isSearchFocused) {
                if (e.key === "ArrowDown" || e.key === "ArrowUp") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(true)
                } else if (e.key === "Enter" && dropdownHighlight) {
                  setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                } else if (e.key === "Escape") {
                  setDropdownHighlight(false)
                }
              }
            }}
            bg="gray.50"
            border="none"
            _focus={{ bg: "white", border: "1px solid", borderColor: "blue.200" }}
          />
        </InputGroup>
        {isSearchFocused && searchQuery.trim() === "" && (
          <Box
            position="absolute"
            top="56px"
            left="16px"
            right="16px"
            zIndex={20}
            border="1px solid"
            borderColor="gray.200"
            borderRadius="md"
            shadow="md"
            bg="white"
          >
            <Box
              px={2}
              py={2}
              cursor="pointer"
              bg={dropdownHighlight ? "blue.50" : undefined}
              _hover={{ bg: "blue.50" }}
              onMouseEnter={() => setDropdownHighlight(true)}
              onMouseLeave={() => setDropdownHighlight(false)}
              onMouseDown={(e) => {
                e.preventDefault()
                setIsMarketplaceOpen(true)
              }}
            >
              <HStack spacing={1}>
                <FiGrid color="gray.500" />
                <Text fontSize="xs">Application Marketplace</Text>
              </HStack>
            </Box>
          </Box>
        )}
      </Box>

      {/* Content Sections */}
      <VStack flex="1" spacing={0} align="stretch" overflow="hidden">
        {/* SPACES Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="spaces">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiGrid size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                SPACES
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
                {filteredGridSpaces.length}
              </Badge>
              {onCreateGridSpace && (
                <Tooltip label="Create New Grid Space" placement="top">
                  <IconButton
                    aria-label="Create New Grid Space"
                    icon={<FiPlus />}
                    size="xs"
                    variant="ghost"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  />
                </Tooltip>
              )}
            </HStack>
          </HStack>

          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="300px">
            {filteredGridSpaces.length > 0 ? (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={3}>
                {filteredGridSpaces.map((space) => {
                  const isCurrent = currentGridSpace && space.id === currentGridSpace.id
                  const hasUnsavedChanges = unsavedSpaces.get(space.id) || false
                  return (
                    <GridSpaceCard
                      key={space.id}
                      gridSpace={{
                        id: space.id,
                        name: space.name,
                        description: space.description,
                        createdAt: space.create_time,
                        isTemporary: (space as any).isTemporary,
                      }}
                      onClick={onGridSpaceSelect}
                      onRename={handleGridSpaceRename}
                      onDelete={handleGridSpaceDelete}
                      onSave={onSaveGridSpace}
                      isCurrent={isCurrent || false}
                      hasUnsavedChanges={hasUnsavedChanges}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            ) : (
              <VStack spacing={3} py={4}>
                <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center">
                  {searchQuery ? "No matching spaces" : "No grid spaces yet"}
                </Text>
                {onCreateGridSpace && !searchQuery && (
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    colorScheme="blue"
                    leftIcon={<FiPlus />}
                    onClick={async () => {
                      const newId = await onCreateGridSpace()
                      if (newId) {
                        onGridSpaceSelect(newId)
                      }
                    }}
                  >
                    Create New Grid Space
                  </Button>
                )}
              </VStack>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>

        <Box py={3}>
          <Divider />
        </Box>

        {/* AGENTS Section */}
        <Box flex="1" overflow="hidden" data-section="agents">
          <HStack p={3} justify="space-between" bg="gray.50">
            <HStack spacing={2}>
              <FiUsers size={14} color="gray.600" />
              <Text fontSize="xs" fontWeight="bold" color="gray.600" textTransform="uppercase">
                MY AGENTS
              </Text>
            </HStack>
            <Badge size="sm" colorScheme="gray" variant="subtle">
              {pinnedApps.length}
            </Badge>
          </HStack>
          <Box p={3} overflow="auto" maxH="400px">
            {pinnedApps.length === 0 ? (
              <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500" textAlign="center" py={4}>
                No pinned applications, add them from Application Marketplace
              </Text>
            ) : (
              <SimpleGrid columns={1} spacing={2}>
                {filteredApplications.map((app) => {
                  const handleUnpin = (applicationId: number) => {
                    setPinnedApps((prev) => {
                      const updated = prev.filter((a) => a.id !== applicationId)
                      localStorage.setItem("pinned_apps", JSON.stringify(updated))
                      return updated
                    })
                    toast({
                      title: "Unpinned",
                      description: `${app.name} removed from AGENTS area`,
                      status: "info",
                      duration: 2000,
                      isClosable: true,
                    })
                  }

                  return (
                    <ApplicationCard
                      key={app.id}
                      application={app}
                      showUnpinButton={true}
                      onUnpin={handleUnpin}
                    />
                  )
                })}
              </SimpleGrid>
            )}
          </Box>
        </Box>
      </VStack>

      {/* Marketplace Modal */}
      <Modal
        isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
        onClose={() => setIsMarketplaceOpen(false)}
        size="6xl"
        motionPreset="scale"
        closeOnOverlayClick={false}
      >
        <ModalOverlay />
        <ModalContent maxW="90vw">
          <ModalHeader />
          <ModalCloseButton />
          <ModalBody p={0}>
            <ApplicationMarketplace
              isOpen={isMarketplaceOpen}
              onAppPin={(app) => {
                handleAppPin(app)
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
              pinnedApps={pinnedApps}
              onAppSelect={() => {
                setPinnedApps(JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("pinned_apps") || "[]"))
              }}
            />
          </ModalBody>
        </ModalContent>
      </Modal>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default React.memo(AIGridSidebar)


```

收到，小黄  
- 在 `AIGridSidebar` 中为 `SPACES` 和 `MY AGENTS` 之间增加了一个 `Box py={3}` 包裹 `Divider`，相当于在上下各留出约 24px 间距。  
- 这样两个区块之间留出更明显的空隙，下方空白也缩短，整体视觉层级更清晰。  

请刷新侧栏确认效果，若需要微调间距大小可以继续反馈。
